papers.title: Danus: Orchestrating Mathematical Reasoning Agents with Fact-Graph Memory
papers.abstract: Recent LLM-based mathematical reasoning agents have begun to tackle research-level problems and, in several cases, have contributed to the resolution of open problems. However, scaling and orchestrating such agents effectively remains challenging, due to the difficulty of coordinating parallel proof search while keeping intermediate claims organized and reliable. In this paper, we propose Danus, an orchestration system for research-level mathematical reasoning centered on a shared fact graph as a global memory-management mechanism. Danus consists of a main agent that performs planning and coordination, multiple worker agents that carry out proof search in parallel, and a stateless verifier that checks proposed mathematical claims before they are admitted into the fact graph. Each verified fact is stored together with its proof and logical dependencies, allowing the system to build long arguments incrementally while keeping the shared proof state organized. The main agent periodically summarizes the evolving proof state, redirects workers across promising directions, and supports interaction with human mathematicians through progress reports. We evaluate Danus through six research-level case studies in algebraic geometry, singularity theory, and combinatorics, illustrating how the fact-graph memory mechanism enables Danus to construct long, detailed mathematical proofs. Our results suggest that fact-graph-based orchestration provides an effective route toward scaling mathematical reasoning agents for long-horizon research problems. Danus is open source at this https URL .

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出了面向研究级数学推理任务的编排系统 Danus，用共享事实图作为全局记忆来组织证明过程。系统由负责规划协调的主智能体、并行执行证明搜索的多个工作智能体，以及用于校验数学断言的无状态验证器组成。被验证通过的事实会连同证明及逻辑依赖一起写入事实图，从而支持逐步构建长链条证明。作者通过多个研究级数学案例说明，这种基于事实图的编排方式有助于扩展长时程数学推理能力。
innovations: 提出以共享事实图为核心的全局记忆管理机制，用于组织并行数学证明搜索中的中间结论。
设计了主智能体、工作智能体和无状态验证器协同工作的多智能体编排框架。
将已验证事实与其证明和逻辑依赖共同存储，支持长证明过程的增量式构建与追踪。
支持对不断演化的证明状态进行周期性总结，并据此重定向搜索方向及生成人类可读进展报告。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向研究级数学推理、开放性证明探索和长时程定理证明场景，适用于需要多个智能体并行搜索、同时严格管理中间结论可靠性的任务。
papers.title_en: Danus: Orchestrating Mathematical Reasoning Agents with Fact-Graph Memory

papers.title: Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation for Edge-Efficient Pathology Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Computational pathology foundation models (PFMs) have advanced whole-slide image analysis. However, their size and inference cost hinder local deployment in pathology departments. We propose MuCoDi, a pretraining framework that distills frozen tile embeddings from multiple PFMs into compact edge-oriented encoders. Instead of regressing individual teacher features, MuCoDi trains lightweight MobileOne and RepViT students with a contrastive distillation objective adapted from MoCo v3, where cached Virchow2, UNI2, and H-Optimus-1 embeddings replace momentum-encoder keys. We pretrain students on 14.3M TCGA tiles from only 11.8K WSIs and evaluate frozen encoders on 23 clinically curated downstream classification tasks. RepViT-based MuCoEdge students retain near-teacher performance while reducing model size by orders of magnitude: MuCoEdge-R2.3 and MuCoEdge-R1.5 reach 71.0% external AUROC, within 0.8 percentage points of the best teacher (Virchow2, 71.8%), while MuCoEdge-R2.3 obtains the best external F1 and the second-best AUPRC (51.8% and 53.3%). MuCoEdge-R1.0 reaches 70.9% AUROC with only 6.4M parameters and 1.12 GFLOPs. On a Raspberry Pi 5, sub-million-parameter MobileOne students achieve up to 605-fold single-tile speedup over Virchow2 while retaining 66.5% to 66.9% external AUROC, demonstrating that PFM-quality pathology representations can be moved toward practical edge deployment. Code is available at this https URL .

papers.title_zh: 面向边缘高效病理基础模型的多教师对比蒸馏
papers.institution: 机构信息未解析到
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文针对计算病理基础模型体量大、推理成本高、难以在病理科本地设备部署的问题，提出了 MuCoDi 预训练框架。它将多个病理基础模型的冻结 tile 嵌入蒸馏到更轻量的边缘编码器中，并用基于对比学习的蒸馏目标替代逐点特征回归。论文重点说明，多教师蒸馏可以在显著缩小模型规模的同时，尽量保留接近教师模型的病理表征能力。
innovations: 提出 MuCoDi，多教师蒸馏多个病理基础模型的 tile embedding，而不是只模仿单一教师。
采用面向学生模型的对比式蒸馏目标，将缓存的教师嵌入作为对比学习键值，替代传统特征回归蒸馏。
面向边缘部署选择轻量学生架构，如 MobileOne 和 RepViT，把病理基础模型能力迁移到小模型上。
将病理基础模型蒸馏问题表述为预训练框架设计，而不仅是单任务下游压缩。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决病理基础模型难以在本地或边缘设备部署的问题，适用于数字病理、全切片图像分析以及医院侧资源受限环境中的表征提取与下游分类场景。
papers.title_en: Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation for Edge-Efficient Pathology Foundation Models

papers.title: Point as Skeleton: Accumulated Point Cloud Enhanced Autoregressive Generation for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation
papers.abstract: Evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) remains challenging, as existing driving simulation methods often trade off closed-loop interactivity (e.g., CARLA) and real-world visual fidelity (e.g., nuScenes). We present \textbf{\emph{Point as Skeleton}}, a generative sensor simulation framework for state-updated autoregressive driving video generation, in which an autoregressive generator synthesizes visual observations from step-wise updated ego states, actor states, scene maps, and point-cloud skeleton conditions. To support closed-loop rollout, we introduce Reset-and-Roll, which adapts rolling diffusion inference to simulation by preventing future-conditioned latent states from being committed across simulation steps. To stabilize error accumulation during step-wise autoregressive rollout, we introduce point-cloud skeletons that decouple foreground and background assets and project them into camera-view painted-point and template-depth conditions, providing appearance and geometric cues. We further implement a nuPlan-based renderer-level closed-loop generative interface for evaluating generation under ego deviations from the original log. Experiments on nuScenes and nuPlan show that \textit{Point as Skeleton} improves autoregressive generation quality during closed-loop rollout, demonstrating its potential for visually faithful closed-loop driving simulation. The code is available at this https URL .

papers.content_snippet: Evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) remains challenging, as existing driving simulation methods often trade off closed-loop interactivity (e.g., CARLA) and real-world visual fidelity (e.g., nuScenes). We present \textbf{\emph{Point as Skeleton}}, a generative sensor simulation framework for state-updated autoregressive driving video generation, in which an autoregressive generator synthesizes visual observations from step-wise updated ego states, actor states, scene maps, and point-cloud skeleton conditions. To support closed-loop rollout, we introduce Reset-and-Roll, which adapts rolling diffusion inference to simulation by preventing future-conditioned latent states from being committed across simulation steps. To stabilize error accumulation during step-wise autoregressive rollout, we introduce point-cloud skeletons that decouple foreground and background assets and project them into camera-view painted-point and template-depth conditions, providing appearance and geometric cues. We further implement a nuPlan-based renderer-level closed-loop generative interface for evaluating generation under ego deviations from the original log. Experiments on nuScenes and nuPlan show that \textit{Point as Skeleton} improves autoregressive generation quality during closed-loop rollout, demonstrating its potential for visually faithful closed-loop driving simulation. The code is available at this https URL .
papers.title_zh: 点作为骨架：基于累积点云增强的闭环自动驾驶仿真自回归生成
papers.institution: 未在题目与摘要中明确给出机构信息
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出了一个用于端到端自动驾驶评测的生成式传感器仿真框架 Point as Skeleton，用逐步更新的自车状态、交通参与者状态、场景地图和点云骨架条件来进行自回归驾驶视频生成。该方法旨在同时兼顾闭环交互能力与真实视觉保真度。论文还设计了适配闭环 rollout 的推理机制，并在 nuScenes 与 nuPlan 上验证了该方法能够提升闭环生成质量。
innovations: 提出状态更新驱动的自回归生成式传感器仿真框架，将自车状态、参与者状态、场景地图与点云骨架联合用于驾驶视觉观测生成
提出 Reset-and-Roll 机制，将 rolling diffusion inference 适配到闭环仿真中，避免未来条件潜变量跨仿真步错误提交
引入点云骨架表示，将前景与背景解耦，并投影为相机视角下的 painted-point 与 template-depth 条件，同时提供外观与几何线索
实现基于 nuPlan 的渲染器级闭环生成接口，可在自车偏离原始日志轨迹时评估生成表现
papers.scenario_cn: 用于端到端自动驾驶系统的闭环仿真评测，解决现有方法在交互闭环能力与真实视觉保真度之间难以兼顾的问题。适用于需要在更真实视觉观测下评估自动驾驶策略、规划或世界模型行为的仿真场景。
papers.title_en: Point as Skeleton: Accumulated Point Cloud Enhanced Autoregressive Generation for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation

papers.title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
papers.abstract: Agentic video understanding equips models with long-term memory to autonomously process and respond to continuous, long-horizon multimodal streams. However, advanced video agents often rely on ``detective-style'' iterative reasoning for action control (e.g., $\mathtt{search}$) and evidence aggregation, incurring prohibitive costs and latency. We argue that such heavy reasoning primarily compensates for the lack of global context and semantic misalignment in retrieval. This paper introduces Light-Omni, a multimodal agent framework for reflexive and lightweight video understanding. It achieves this through dual contextual states that instantly build the required context in a single forward pass. First, we maintain a global state, a finite-sized multimodal script continuously consolidated from episodic memory, serving as the global context for Light-Omni. Through hierarchical merging, it preserves recent details while summarizing past events. Second, conditioned on this global context, we generate a parametric latent state that directly drives autonomous actions and produces retrieval embeddings, with minimal latency. Benefiting from this coupled design, Light-Omni achieves semantically aligned retrieval and reflexive responses while avoiding iterative reasoning. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of Light-Omni across multiple video benchmarks. Notably, it outperforms M3-Agent with an average 2.4% accuracy gain, a 12.1$\times$ speedup, and a 2.6$\times$ improvement in GPU memory efficiency. Furthermore, it serves as a memory system to enhance both the performance and efficiency of existing MLLMs. Project page: this https URL .

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 Light-Omni，一个面向长时程多模态视频流的轻量级智能体视频理解框架。作者认为许多视频智能体依赖反复检索和迭代推理，根本原因在于缺少全局上下文以及检索语义不对齐。为此，Light-Omni 通过一次前向过程构建所需上下文，以支持更快的自主动作决策与检索。论文还指出，该框架既能提升视频理解表现，也可作为记忆系统增强现有多模态大模型。
innovations: 提出以“反射式”响应替代重型迭代推理的视频智能体框架，目标是降低长视频理解中的成本与时延。
设计双重上下文状态，包括由情节记忆持续整合形成的全局状态，以及在全局状态条件下生成的参数化潜在状态。
通过分层合并机制在有限大小的多模态脚本中兼顾近期细节保留与过去事件摘要。
将潜在状态同时用于自主动作驱动和检索嵌入生成，以改善检索的语义对齐。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向连续、长时程、多模态视频流的自主理解与响应任务，适用于需要长期记忆、在线检索和低时延决策的视频智能体场景，也适合作为现有多模态大模型的外接记忆模块。
papers.title_en: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory

papers.title: CHARLIE: An On-Premise Multi-Agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation System for Evidential Reasoning in Forensic Science
papers.abstract: We present Charlie, an on-premise multi-agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for structured evidential processing in digital forensic environments. Contemporary forensic workflows must handle large volumes of heterogeneous and unstructured documents under strict requirements of traceability, confidentiality, and legal compliance. Charlie addresses this challenge through a controlled agent architecture that combines local retrieval, task decomposition, structured memory, and verification mechanisms. Unlike cloud-based systems, it operates entirely within institutional infrastructure, preserving data sovereignty and evidential integrity. We describe the systems architecture, including its transition from classical RAG to agent-based orchestration, and demonstrate its application in real-world forensic scenarios. Case studies show that Charlie enables scalable multi-document data extraction and supports longitudinal forensic intelligence generation while maintaining traceability and auditability. Our results indicate that agent-orchestrated, on-premise RAG architectures can effectively support evidential workflows without compromising legal and institutional constraints. Charlie provides a practical and reproducible blueprint for deploying AI systems in high-stakes forensic environments. This manuscript is an archival version of a paper presented at the RELAF 2026 Workshop.

papers.title_zh: CHARLIE：面向法庭科学证据推理的本地部署多智能体检索增强生成系统
papers.institution: 未明确提取
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一个面向数字取证环境的本地部署多智能体 RAG 系统 Charlie，用于处理大规模异构、非结构化证据文档。系统通过受控的智能体架构结合本地检索、任务分解、结构化记忆和验证机制，在机构内部基础设施上完成证据处理。作者还展示了其从传统 RAG 向智能体编排演进的系统设计，以及在真实取证场景中的应用。
innovations: 提出完全部署在机构内部基础设施中的多智能体 RAG 架构，以满足数据主权、保密性和法律合规要求。
将本地检索、任务分解、结构化记忆与验证机制组合到统一的证据处理流程中。
给出从经典 RAG 过渡到 agent-based orchestration 的系统化架构蓝图，并强调可追踪性与可审计性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于数字取证、执法证据分析及其他高风险、强合规场景，尤其适合不能将敏感数据发送到云端、又需要多文档抽取和长期情报整理的应用。

papers.title: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Agent systems accumulate conflicting observations across branches, retries, and replicas, yet many practical memory layers still collapse disagreement behind overwrite rules that are difficult to inspect or correct. We present StateFuse, a conflict-aware replicated memory contract built on standard OpSet/CRDT merge. StateFuse does not introduce a new join algebra; it defines an agent-facing semantics layer with immutable history, explicit conflict objects, exact and semantic correction handles (claim_id / claim_ref), deterministic predicate contracts, and projection-time resolution that cannot rewrite replicated state. We evaluate StateFuse against flat multi-value, raw-log, provenance-style, and collapsed baselines under matched resolver and verification policies. On a 282-question official conflict-bearing MemoryAgentBench slice, the compared methods tie on answer accuracy, but conflict-preserving surfaces keep contradictions visible while collapsed surfaces do not. In a controlled agent loop with uniform verification, preserving ambiguity enables safer abstention and correction than early collapse. A correction-handle ablation further shows that semantic handles matter when exact prior identifiers are unavailable. The resulting claim is narrow: StateFuse is best supported as a safer public memory contract for contradiction surfacing, abstention, and auditable correction, not as a universal accuracy gain.

papers.content_snippet: Agent systems accumulate conflicting observations across branches, retries, and replicas, yet many practical memory layers still collapse disagreement behind overwrite rules that are difficult to inspect or correct. We present StateFuse, a conflict-aware replicated memory contract built on standard OpSet/CRDT merge. StateFuse does not introduce a new join algebra; it defines an agent-facing semantics layer with immutable history, explicit conflict objects, exact and semantic correction handles (claim_id / claim_ref), deterministic predicate contracts, and projection-time resolution that cannot rewrite replicated state. We evaluate StateFuse against flat multi-value, raw-log, provenance-style, and collapsed baselines under matched resolver and verification policies. On a 282-question official conflict-bearing MemoryAgentBench slice, the compared methods tie on answer accuracy, but conflict-preserving surfaces keep contradictions visible while collapsed surfaces do not. In a controlled agent loop with uniform verification, preserving ambiguity enables safer abstention and correction than early collapse. A correction-handle ablation further shows that semantic handles matter when exact prior identifiers are unavailable. The resulting claim is narrow: StateFuse is best supported as a safer public memory contract for contradiction surfacing, abstention, and auditable correction, not as a universal accuracy gain.
papers.title_zh: StateFuse：面向多智能体系统的确定性冲突保留记忆
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文讨论多智能体系统在分支执行、重试和副本同步过程中会积累相互冲突的观察结果，而传统记忆层往往通过覆盖式规则把分歧隐藏掉。作者提出 StateFuse，一种建立在标准 OpSet/CRDT 合并之上的冲突感知复制式记忆契约，用不可变历史、显式冲突对象和纠错句柄来保留矛盾。实验表明，它不一定提升最终问答准确率，但能更安全地暴露冲突、支持弃答，并让后续纠错更可审计。
innovations: 提出面向智能体的冲突保留记忆语义层，而不是重新设计新的底层 join algebra。
引入显式冲突对象以及精确/语义两类纠错句柄（claim_id 与 claim_ref），便于在无法精确定位旧声明时仍能修正记忆。
采用投影阶段解析冲突的机制，避免在解析时重写复制状态，从而保留原始冲突历史。
在统一解析器与验证策略下对多种记忆表面进行对比，强调“保留矛盾可见性”这一安全性收益。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于多智能体协作、带重试与分支执行的 Agent 系统记忆管理场景，尤其适合需要显式暴露矛盾、支持审计式修正和安全弃答的公共记忆层。
papers.title_en: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems

papers.title: Think Before You Grid-Search: Floor-First Triage for LLM Serving
papers.abstract: LLM serving optimization typically benchmarks many configurations and reaches for heavy profilers when latency targets are missed. We argue for the reverse discipline: estimation is the analytical layer of profiling -- without it, optimization degenerates to grid search. Floor First is a residual-driven triage workflow. Each decode step is modeled as a five-dimensional resource vector (HBM bytes, FLOPs, network bytes, network messages, KV capacity); summing within a resource and maximizing across resources gives an optimistic floor, the plain sum a pessimistic one. Where a measurement lands inside this [max, sum] interval reads out overlap quality before any profiler is opened, and profilers escalate only on residuals above a stated threshold. Deployment alternatives are compared by wall ordering -- which resource wall binds first as load grows -- rather than by point benchmarks. The account is compositional: new attention or state-space variants enter by declaring one module, and the workflow ships as a zero-dependency calculator plus an agent skill that enforces the discipline in agentic optimization loops. As a case study we analyze a DeepSeek-V3.2-style 671B MoE/MLA model on 16 NVIDIA H20 GPUs, whose ridge point of ~74 FLOP/byte (vs ~590 for H100) makes it an extreme decode-oriented part. The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.4x. The layout judgment is thus a computable function of the operating point, explaining why production deployments on identical hardware have shipped opposite attention layouts.

papers.title_zh: 先思考，再做网格搜索：面向大语言模型服务的下界优先分诊
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注 LLM Serving 优化中“先大量试配置、再上重型 profiler”的常见做法，并提出相反的分析流程。作者给出 Floor First 分诊框架，把每个解码步表示为五维资源向量，并用乐观/悲观下界区间判断系统的重叠质量，再决定是否需要进一步剖析。论文核心贡献是把部署选择从点状基准测试，转为依据不同资源瓶颈随负载变化的先后顺序来做判断。
innovations: 提出残差驱动的 Floor First 分诊流程，先用解析估计建立性能下界，再决定是否升级到 profiler。
将解码步骤统一建模为包含 HBM、FLOPs、网络字节、网络消息和 KV 容量的五维资源向量。
用测量值落在 [max, sum] 区间中的位置来刻画资源重叠质量，而不是只看单点延迟或吞吐。
提出依据资源墙绑定顺序（wall ordering）比较不同部署布局，使布局选择依赖运行点而非固定 benchmark 排名。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于大模型在线推理服务的性能诊断、容量规划和并行布局选择，特别适合需要在 TP、EP、DP 或不同注意力实现之间做系统级取舍的 Serving 场景。
papers.title_en: Think Before You Grid-Search: Floor-First Triage for LLM Serving

papers.title: Beyond the Leaderboard: A Synthesis of Tool-Use, Planning, and Reasoning Failures in Large Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to use tools, plan multi-step tasks, coordinate with other agents, and operate over extended horizons. Reported benchmark gains often obscure recurring failure modes documented across otherwise unrelated evaluation efforts. This paper synthesizes 27 benchmark, taxonomy, and audit papers (2023-2026), spanning 19 distinct benchmarks, into a cross-cutting taxonomy of agent limitations. To our knowledge, this is the first synthesis that integrates evidence across tool use, planning, long-horizon reasoning, multi-agent coordination, safety, and measurement validity into a single, unified taxonomy of LLM agent limitations. We identify six failure clusters: (1) tool invocation and parameter-level errors, (2) planning and constraint-satisfaction failures, (3) long-horizon degradation from context accumulation, (4) multi-agent coordination failures, (5) safety and security failures under adversarial or underspecified conditions, and (6) measurement validity problems. The taxonomy was derived iteratively by grouping independently reported error categories into themes corresponding to distinct stages of the agent reasoning-to-action pipeline. Across the literature, we find that failures compound nonlinearly with task length, that strong performance on individual sub-tasks does not reliably translate into end-to-end success, and that additional scaffolding does not consistently improve reliability. At the same time, substantial progress has been demonstrated in single-turn tool use, short-horizon web navigation, and narrowly scoped coding tasks.

papers.title_zh: 超越排行榜：大语言模型智能体中工具使用、规划与推理失效的综合研究
papers.institution: 未明确提取
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文并非提出新模型，而是综合分析 2023 到 2026 年间关于大语言模型智能体评测的多篇 benchmark、taxonomy 与 audit 工作。作者将工具使用、规划、长程推理、多智能体协作、安全性与测量有效性等问题统一整理成一套跨任务失效分类体系。论文指出，许多排行榜提升掩盖了端到端任务中反复出现的失效模式。
innovations: 综合 27 篇相关论文与 19 个基准，构建统一的 LLM agent 局限性分类框架。
提出六类跨阶段失效簇，覆盖工具调用、约束满足、长程退化、多智能体协作、安全与测量有效性。
从 reasoning-to-action pipeline 视角整合不同文献中的错误类别，而不是停留在单一 benchmark 结论。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究和评估 LLM 智能体系统鲁棒性、设计新 benchmark、分析多步任务失败原因的场景，也适合为 agent 系统的评测指标和安全审计提供参考。
papers.title_en: Beyond the Leaderboard: A Synthesis of Tool-Use, Planning, and Reasoning Failures in Large Language Model Agents

papers.title: Segmentation before Answering: Pixel Grounding for MLLM Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have evolved from static perception to interleaved visual-language reasoning, often referred to as ``thinking with images''. A basic operation in this reasoning process is to zoom in on regions of interest (often represented with bounding boxes) to acquire finer visual details. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Seg}mentation before \textbf{Answer}ing (SegAnswer), which shifts the unit of zoom-in from the popular bounding box to pixel-level segmentation mask. By employing fine-grained masks to isolate the target area from cluttered environments, segmented visual input yields a more precise region of interest, effectively filtering out redundant background and interfering objects. Furthermore, the discrete patches of segmented visual input align more seamlessly with how MLLMs structure visual tokens via positional embeddings. In experiments, we evaluate SegAnswer across diverse benchmarks, including high-resolution perception, general perception, and hallucination. It achieves consistent improvements and also exhibits considerable performance on segmentation tasks, validating its capability for reliable pixel grounding.

papers.content_snippet: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have evolved from static perception to interleaved visual-language reasoning, often referred to as ``thinking with images''. A basic operation in this reasoning process is to zoom in on regions of interest (often represented with bounding boxes) to acquire finer visual details. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Seg}mentation before \textbf{Answer}ing (SegAnswer), which shifts the unit of zoom-in from the popular bounding box to pixel-level segmentation mask. By employing fine-grained masks to isolate the target area from cluttered environments, segmented visual input yields a more precise region of interest, effectively filtering out redundant background and interfering objects. Furthermore, the discrete patches of segmented visual input align more seamlessly with how MLLMs structure visual tokens via positional embeddings. In experiments, we evaluate SegAnswer across diverse benchmarks, including high-resolution perception, general perception, and hallucination. It achieves consistent improvements and also exhibits considerable performance on segmentation tasks, validating its capability for reliable pixel grounding.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 SegAnswer，主张在多模态大模型进行视觉推理时，先用像素级分割掩码而不是边界框来定位关注区域。作者认为，分割后的输入能更精确地隔离目标区域，减少背景和干扰物带来的噪声。与此同时，这种离散的分割区域也更贴合多模态模型通过位置编码组织视觉 token 的方式。实验表明，该方法在多类视觉基准上都带来稳定提升，并具备可靠的像素级 grounding 能力。
innovations: 将视觉推理中的放大与定位单元从常见的边界框切换为像素级分割掩码。
利用分割掩码隔离目标区域，减少复杂场景中的冗余背景和干扰物影响。
指出分割后的离散视觉块与多模态大模型的视觉 token 结构更自然对齐。
在高分辨率感知、通用感知、幻觉评测及分割任务上统一验证像素级 grounding 的价值。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要精细区域定位和更可靠视觉推理的多模态问答与感知场景，尤其适合高分辨率图像理解、复杂背景目标分析以及需要降低视觉幻觉的任务。
papers.title_en: Segmentation before Answering: Pixel Grounding for MLLM Visual Reasoning

papers.title: Detecting Vulnerability-Inducing Commits via Multi-Stage Reasoning with LLM-Based Agents
papers.abstract: Detecting vulnerability-inducing commits (VICs) at submission time is critical for improving the security and reliability of software systems. However, this task is highly challenging because it requires reasoning about the semantic impact of code changes from heterogeneous information sources, including code diffs, commit messages, and the surrounding contextual code. Existing approaches often struggle to fully capture these complex interactions, resulting in limited detection performance. In this paper, we propose VIC-RAGENT, an LLM-based multi-agent framework for effective and explainable vulnerability detection. VIC-RAGENT leverages multiple specialized agents to provide complementary perspectives, including structural analysis, intent understanding, and vulnerability inspection. To further improve detection reliability, the framework employs a multi-stage reasoning process that progressively refines candidate vulnerabilities through preliminary inspection, reanalysis, and a final decision stage. Experimental results on a real-world dataset across multiple LLMs demonstrate that VIC-RAGENT consistently outperforms baselines, including Direct, CoT, and CodeAgent. Compared to the strongest baseline, VIC-RAGENT achieves 1.2-1.7x higher F1-scores across different models. Overall, VIC-RAGENT offers a robust, explainable, and practical solution for detecting VICs in modern software development workflows.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何在代码提交阶段识别会引入漏洞的提交。作者提出 VIC-RAGENT，这是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，联合利用代码 diff、提交信息和上下文代码等异构信息进行分析。该方法通过初步检查、复审和最终决策的多阶段推理流程逐步收敛候选漏洞，从而提升检测的可靠性和可解释性。实验表明，它在真实数据集上优于 Direct、CoT 和 CodeAgent 等基线。
innovations: 提出 VIC-RAGENT 多智能体框架，从结构分析、意图理解和漏洞检查等互补视角联合检测漏洞引入提交。
引入多阶段推理流程，将漏洞判断分为初步检查、再分析和最终决策三个阶段，以逐步精炼结论。
联合建模代码差异、提交消息和周边上下文代码等异构信息，增强对语义影响的理解。
强调检测结果的可解释性，使其更适合现代软件开发流程中的安全审查使用。
papers.scenario_cn: 用于软件开发与代码审查场景下的漏洞引入提交检测，适合在提交时或持续集成流程中提前识别可能降低系统安全性与可靠性的代码变更。
papers.title_en: Detecting Vulnerability-Inducing Commits via Multi-Stage Reasoning with LLM-Based Agents

papers.title: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations
papers.abstract: Putnam's Social Capital Theory is a foundational framework for collective action and community prosperity. However, traditional empirical methods face practical limits on control and replication. Meanwhile, LLM-based social simulations are typically behavior-driven and lack theory-aligned environments for modeling Putnam's core propositions. To address these gaps, we introduce SocaSim, an LLM-based multi-agent simulation framework to study Putnam's Social Capital Theory from theoretical blueprint to simulated reality. Specifically, we build an environment integrating social network evolution, trust dynamics, and norm propagation, where agents engage in repeated collective-action experiments, and then apply the three dimensions to analyze adaptation challenges in smart elderly care. Our simulations reproduce Putnam's macro-level patterns and exhibit strong human-agent alignment at the group level. Unlike traditional methods, SocaSim traces micro-level causal pathways of social network, trust, and norms via round-by-round simulations and counterfactual interventions, enabling process-level interpretability. Taken together, these capabilities establish a research paradigm that leverages LLM agents to bridge social science and computer science.

Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Computation and Language arXiv:2607.06080 (cs) [Submitted on 7 Jul 2026] Title: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations Authors: Shiyi Ling , Zhi Zheng , Hui Zheng , Wenjun Xue , Feng Ye , Tong Xu View a PDF of the paper titled From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations, by Shiyi Ling and 5 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Putnam's Social Capital Theory is a foundational framework for collective action and community prosperity. However, traditional empirical methods face practical limits on control and replication. Meanwhile, LLM-based social simulations are typically behavior-driven and lack theory-aligned environments for modeling Putnam's core propositions. To address these gaps, we introduce SocaSim, an LLM-based multi-agent simulation framework to study Putnam's Social Capital Theory from theoretical blueprint to simulated reality. Specifically, we build an environment integrating social network evolution, trust dynamics, and norm propagation, where agents engage in repeated collective-action experiments, and then apply the three dimensions to analyze adaptation challenges in smart elderly care. Our simulations reproduce Putnam's macro-level patterns and exhibit strong human-agent alignment at the group level. Unlike traditional methods, SocaSim traces micro-level causal pathways of social network, trust, and norms via round-by-round simulations and counterfactual interventions, enabling process-level interpretability. Taken together, these capabilities establish a research paradigm that leverages LLM agents to bridge social science and computer science. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 SocaSim，一个用于研究 Putnam 社会资本理论的基于大语言模型的多智能体模拟框架。作者构建了同时包含社会网络演化、信任动态和规范传播的模拟环境，让智能体在重复的集体行动实验中交互。该框架不仅能够复现理论关注的宏观模式，还能通过逐轮模拟和反事实干预追踪微观因果路径。论文进一步将这一框架用于分析智慧养老中的适应性挑战。
innovations: 提出与 Putnam 社会资本理论对齐的多智能体模拟框架，而非仅做行为驱动式社会模拟。
在统一环境中同时建模社会网络演化、信任动态和规范传播三类关键机制。
通过逐轮模拟与反事实干预提供过程级可解释性，用于追踪微观因果路径。
将该理论驱动模拟框架应用到智慧养老适应性分析，连接社会科学理论与计算方法。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于社会科学理论验证、集体行动研究、社区协作机制分析以及智慧养老等需要研究信任、网络和规范如何共同作用的模拟场景。
papers.title_en: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations

papers.title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy by matching a stronger teacher on the student's own trajectories, offering a promising framework for language agent training. However, its application to long-horizon agentic tasks remains insufficiently explored. We identify two key inefficiencies in vanilla agent OPD: (1) full-horizon rollouts often waste wall-clock resources on tail turns that provide weak and noisy KL supervision, and (2) trajectory-level KL objectives concentrate most of the loss on shallow tokens, leaving deeper decision turns under-trained once initial behaviors are aligned. To address these challenges, we propose TurnOPD, a turn-level budgeting strategy for efficient on-policy distillation of long-horizon agents. TurnOPD consists of two budget controllers: adaptive rollout-depth budgeting, which uses probe-based turn statistics to determine rollout length, and progressive turn-normalized loss budgeting, which gradually shifts KL weighting from token-level to turn-balanced supervision. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Multi-Hop Search with task-specialized teacher models show that TurnOPD achieves superior validation accuracy under equal wall-clock training budgets and advances the accuracy--time frontier beyond vanilla OPD.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注长时程智能体训练中的在线策略蒸馏效率问题。作者指出传统 OPD 在长轨迹任务中存在两类低效：尾部轮次会浪费训练时间，而轨迹级 KL 目标又容易让浅层 token 主导训练。为此，论文提出 TurnOPD，通过轮次级预算控制来决定 rollout 深度，并逐步把监督重点从 token 级转向更均衡的轮次级监督。实验显示，该方法在相同训练时间预算下取得了更好的验证表现。
innovations: 识别出长时程智能体在线策略蒸馏中的两类关键低效来源：尾部 rollout 浪费和浅层 token 主导训练。
提出自适应 rollout 深度预算机制，依据探测得到的轮次统计信息动态决定 rollout 长度。
提出渐进式轮次归一化损失预算机制，将 KL 监督从 token 级逐步过渡到更均衡的 turn-level 监督。
面向长时程 agent 训练引入轮次感知的蒸馏视角，提升精度与时间效率之间的权衡。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要长轨迹决策和多轮交互的语言智能体训练场景，如交互式任务求解、网页操作、多跳搜索等，希望在有限训练时间下提高学生策略学习效率。
papers.title_en: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training

papers.title: Beyond Static Evaluation: Building Simulation Environments for Scalable Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into autonomous agents, traditional static evaluation fails to capture multi-step decision-making. We introduce AgenticAI-Supervisor, an API and UI-driven RL Gym environment that decouples environment creation from scalable execution. By moving to verifiable execution outcomes, the platform generates high-fidelity traces and applies multi-dimensional reward shaping. Critically, our framework mitigates reward hacking through rigorous internal state validation and testing. This work provides a first look at our platform's core capabilities through a Customer Support Agent case study demonstrating a consistent closed-loop feedback for model optimization. Future work will focus on advanced features such as Computer Use, Tool Use, automated "stumping", and edge-case generation.

papers.title_zh: 超越静态评测：面向可扩展 Agent 强化学习的仿真环境构建
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文指出，面向自主智能体的传统静态评测无法反映多步决策能力，因此提出了一个名为 AgenticAI-Supervisor 的强化学习仿真环境。该环境以 API 和 UI 驱动，将环境构建与大规模执行解耦，并基于可验证的执行结果生成高保真轨迹与多维奖励。论文还通过客户支持智能体案例展示了一个可用于模型优化的闭环反馈流程。
innovations: 提出 AgenticAI-Supervisor，将 Agent 仿真环境的创建与可扩展执行解耦。
以可验证执行结果替代静态评测信号，用于生成高保真交互轨迹和奖励反馈。
引入多维奖励塑形机制，以更贴近多步任务中的真实优化目标。
通过内部状态校验与测试来缓解 reward hacking 问题。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要评估和训练多步决策型语言智能体的场景，如客服 Agent、工具调用 Agent 和更一般的闭环强化学习优化环境。其核心解决的是静态 benchmark 难以覆盖真实交互与长期决策的问题。
papers.title_en: Beyond Static Evaluation: Building Simulation Environments for Scalable Agentic Reinforcement Learning

papers.title: From Conversation to Contribution: Characterizing Coding Agent in Open-Source Software
papers.abstract: AI coding assistants such as GitHub Copilot and Cursor have evolved from code-suggestion tools into conversational collaborators, enabling vibe-coding workflows in which developers guide AI-generated code through natural-language dialogue. Although researchers have increasingly recognized the importance of AI coding agents and begun examining their impact on open-source development, a comprehensive understanding of how developers' chat-based interactions with AI relate to subsequent open-source development and collaboration remains limited. This hinders efforts to effectively design, evaluate, and govern AI-assisted open-source software development. To address this gap, we collected 13,360 AI conversation sessions comprising 79,172 user messages from 1,356 OSS repositories, linked them to repository development histories, and complemented this analysis with a targeted developer survey. We find heavier AI use in smaller, less mature, and less collaborative repositories. After AI adoption, projects tended to show more active contributors and lower contributor concentration (p < .001), although communication remained highly concentrated. Code Writing was the dominant chat purpose, and nearly all AI chat sessions were followed by subsequent commits. We find no broad deterioration in code-quality signals or pull request merging rates. However, developers perceive others' AI-generated code as harder to maintain than their own (p = .029) and view AI as lowering barriers to OSS contribution. While most developers (68%) are willing to share their chat, concerns remain around appearing incompetent, increasing reviewer burden, and exposing ideas to competitors. These findings provide a large-scale empirical characterization of AI-assisted OSS contribution and offer practical insights for designing and governing responsible vibe-coding practices in open-source development.

To address this gap, we collected 13,360 AI conversation sessions comprising 79,172 user messages from 1,356 OSS repositories, linked them to repository development histories, and complemented this analysis with a targeted developer survey. We find heavier AI use in smaller, less mature, and less collaborative repositories. After AI adoption, projects tended to show more active contributors and lower contributor concentration (p < .001), although communication remained highly concentrated. Code Writing was the dominant chat purpose, and nearly all AI chat sessions were followed by subsequent commits. We find no broad deterioration in code-quality signals or pull request merging rates. However, developers perceive others' AI-generated code as harder to maintain than their own (p = .029) and view AI as lowering barriers to OSS contribution. While most developers (68%) are willing to share their chat, concerns remain around appearing incompetent, increasing reviewer burden, and exposing ideas to competitors. These findings provide a large-scale empirical characterization of AI-assisted OSS contribution and offer practical insights for designing and governing responsible vibe-coding practices in open-source development. papers.title: Harnessing Code Agents for Automatic Software Verification
papers.abstract: Formal verification offers the strongest guarantee of software correctness, but it does not scale: the proofs demanded by interactive theorem provers such as Coq require enormous expert effort. Large language models (LLMs) promise to generate these proofs automatically, yet existing approaches wire a fixed, human-designed proof strategy into the system and constrain the model to follow it (retrieving premises and predicting tactics one step at a time, or splitting goals by divide-and-conquer), and still prove only a fraction of their target theorems. We show that imposing such a strategy is unnecessary and limiting. Handing the whole lemma to a general LLM code agent (for example, Claude Code), free to choose its own approach, and wrapping it in a verification harness is both simpler and more effective, achieving full coverage: every targeted lemma proved, with no failures and no Coq expert intervention. The agent writes the proofs under feedback and hard constraints from the harness that keep each one sound (accepted only when the prover's kernel closes it), complete (no obligation left unproved or silently dropped), and terminating (no divergent tactics). We evaluate this harness plus code agent along three dimensions. (1) Core logic: on Iris, the state-of-the-art separation logic for concurrent and memory-manipulating programs, Aria proves all 4,257 lemmas of the four core modules and the 217 lemmas verifying Rust's standard libraries built on it, fully automatically. (2) Comparison with prior LLM provers: on reglang, where prior provers manage barely one in eight, Aria proves all 318. (3) Generality: on iris-lean, the unfinished Lean 4 port of Iris, it proves 72 not-yet-ported lemmas, showing the approach is not specific to Coq. A state-of-the-art model (Claude Opus 4.7) can write proofs for verified software development fully and automatically.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文针对交互式定理证明中人工证明成本高、难以扩展的问题，提出将通用大模型代码 Agent 直接置于验证闭环中，而不是强行限定固定证明策略。作者构建了一个 verification harness，让 Agent 在反馈与硬约束下自动生成证明，并由证明器内核负责最终验收。实验表明，该方法在多个基准和不同证明体系上都取得了很强的自动证明能力。
innovations: 提出不预设固定人工证明策略，而是让通用代码 Agent 自主选择证明路径。
设计 verification harness，在 soundness、completeness 和 termination 约束下对 Agent 生成的证明进行闭环控制。
在 Iris、reglang 和 iris-lean 等不同任务与证明环境上验证了该方法的通用性。
展示了代码 Agent 在正式验证场景下可直接承担完整证明生成工作的可行性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于 Coq、Lean 等交互式定理证明环境中的自动证明与已验证软件开发。其解决的是形式化验证高度依赖专家人工编写证明、扩展性不足的问题。
papers.title_en: Harnessing Code Agents for Automatic Software Verification

papers.title: Memory in the Loop: In-Process Retrieval as ExtendedWorking Memory for Language Agents
papers.abstract: Language agents run a loop - observe, reason, act - but the memory they reason over sits outside it: a store queried at most once per turn. We study the regime where memory moves inside the loop, read and written on every step. The obstacle has always been latency: networked stores answer in tens to hundreds of milliseconds, and in-loop retrieval can inflate end-to-end latency by up to 83x when retrieval is expensive. Prior work manages that cost rather than questioning it: serving-layer scheduling hides it, "memory-first" designs ration retrieval to once per turn. We argue latency is a property of where the store lives, not the in-loop pattern: an in-process store answers in ~100us, three orders of magnitude below the network regime, and at that speed the per-step tax collapses. By the extended-mind thesis's parity principle, a store fast enough to be constantly and directly available becomes extended working memory, not a tool the agent merely consults. The premise is causal: holding a fixed per-turn memory-latency budget and varying only the store's answer speed, redundant actions rise monotonically with latency - 0.0 of 12 at in-process speed, 7.2 of 12 at a 110ms cloud round trip (gpt-5-nano, gpt-5-mini; exact permutation p=0.0079). We demonstrate the regime end-to-end: across four GPT-5-class models under a bounded window, recall improves from 0/5 to 3.6-4.8/5 with in-loop memory, store ops at p50 80-165us - though an instructed restate-every-reply baseline also solves it perfectly, at a token cost that grows with the working set. The store never lost a fact in any run (244 of 244 writes kept); every miss traces to the agent's read policy, not the store. Our measurements also relocate the bottleneck: the dominant per-step cost is embedding (~200-400ms over the network); pairing the in-process store with a small local embedder returns the complete operation to a measured ~40us.

papers.title_zh: 环内记忆：作为语言 Agent 扩展工作记忆的进程内检索
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究将记忆读写放入语言 Agent 的每一步 observe-reason-act 循环中，而非每轮仅查询一次外部记忆。作者认为，阻碍这一范式的关键不是模式本身，而是网络化存储带来的高延迟；当记忆存储迁移到进程内后，检索延迟可大幅下降，从而使其更像扩展工作记忆。实验展示了这种 in-process memory 能在受限上下文窗口下改善回忆能力，并指出新的主要瓶颈转移到了 embedding。
innovations: 提出将 memory 放入 agent 每一步循环内部的 in-process retrieval 范式。
从延迟角度重新解释 memory 设计，认为限制来自存储位置而非 in-loop 模式本身。
通过对比不同记忆响应延迟，分析延迟上升如何导致冗余动作增加。
指出在进程内存储足够快时，系统瓶颈会从检索转移到 embedding 过程。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要长期记忆、受上下文窗口限制且需频繁读写状态的语言智能体系统，如任务执行 Agent、对话 Agent 和带检索的推理 Agent。它主要解决的是传统外部记忆延迟高，难以支持细粒度环内调用的问题。
papers.title_en: Memory in the Loop: In-Process Retrieval as ExtendedWorking Memory for Language Agents

papers.title: SCOPE: Leveraging Subgoal Critiques for Code Generation
papers.abstract: Code generation with large language models (LLMs) remains unreliable because generated programs can appear correct while still violating key semantic requirements in the natural language specification. Existing feedback-based methods improve over coder-only generation, but they often rely on unstructured critique or execution signals that do not explicitly identify what the code is semantically missing. We present SCOPE, a prover-initialized subgoal critic for code generation. SCOPE adapts a Lean-oriented prover model to produce three parseable feedback fields for downstream code generation: subgoals, gap analysis, and a robustness checklist. Our approach combines supervised fine-tuning, process-aligned reinforcement learning (RL), and feedback-guided inference, with two complementary rewards during RL: a dense reward for structured critique quality and a sparse reward based on whether the critique improves the coder's execution score. Experiments show that SCOPE improves over the compared feedback baselines. On LiveCodeBench V6, SCOPE achieves 39.4% pass@1, compared with 36.6% for Reflexion and 20.6% for the coder-only baseline. On BigCodeBench (Hard), it reaches 42.6%, surpassing Reflexion at 36.5% and coder-only generation at 34.5%. Further analysis shows that SCOPE's gains are concentrated in tasks with concrete semantic constraints and that its code corrections are more localized than Reflexion's.

SCOPE adapts a Lean-oriented prover model to produce three parseable feedback fields for downstream code generation: subgoals, gap analysis, and a robustness checklist. Our approach combines supervised fine-tuning, process-aligned reinforcement learning (RL), and feedback-guided inference, with two complementary rewards during RL: a dense reward for structured critique quality and a sparse reward based on whether the critique improves the coder's execution score. Experiments show that SCOPE improves over the compared feedback baselines. On LiveCodeBench V6, SCOPE achieves 39.4% pass@1, compared with 36.6% for Reflexion and 20.6% for the coder-only baseline. On BigCodeBench (Hard), it reaches 42.6%, surpassing Reflexion at 36.5% and coder-only generation at 34.5%. Further analysis shows that SCOPE's gains are concentrated in tasks with concrete semantic constraints and that its code corrections are more localized than Reflexion's.
papers.title_zh: SCOPE：利用子目标批判进行代码生成
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 SCOPE，用于提升大语言模型代码生成的语义可靠性。它不是只给出笼统反馈或单纯依赖执行信号，而是使用经过 prover 初始化的子目标批判器，生成可解析的三类反馈：子目标、缺口分析和鲁棒性检查清单。该方法结合监督微调、过程对齐强化学习和反馈引导推理，以帮助代码模型更准确地修补与需求语义不一致的问题。
innovations: 提出 prover-initialized subgoal critic，将代码反馈显式结构化为子目标、缺口分析和鲁棒性检查清单，而非非结构化评论。
将 Lean 导向的证明器模型适配到代码生成反馈任务中，用形式化风格的中间目标约束代码修正过程。
强化学习阶段同时使用结构化批判质量的稠密奖励与能否提升下游执行成绩的稀疏奖励，联合优化反馈有效性。
强调反馈驱动的局部修正能力，使代码修改更聚焦于语义缺失部分。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要严格满足自然语言规格、容易出现“看似正确但语义不符”问题的代码生成场景，尤其适合编程助手、自动修复和基于反馈迭代改写代码的系统。
papers.title_en: SCOPE: Leveraging Subgoal Critiques for Code Generation

papers.title: FreqDepthKV: Frequency-Guided Depth Sharing for Robust KV Cache Compression in Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Long-context LLM inference is increasingly limited by the memory and bandwidth cost of KV caches, yet aggressive compression can remove the layer-specific evidence needed for retrieval and multi-step reasoning. We introduce FreqDepthKV, an inference-time cache compression method that factorizes adjacent-layer KV states into shared low-frequency depth components and sparse high-frequency residuals. A lightweight online probe assigns attention heads to shared-depth, residual-depth, or exact cache modes according to their contribution to reconstruction-sensitive attention logits, allowing the compression policy to adapt to prompt structure without retraining. Across long-context question answering, needle retrieval, summarization, and code generation benchmarks, FreqDepthKV preserves task accuracy under substantially smaller cache budgets. With a 32k-token prefill window, FreqDepthKV reaches 58.3 Exact Match, 63.0 F1, 32.5 ROUGE-L, and 48.1 pass@1, closely matching full KV while outperforming prior compressed-cache methods. It also improves decoding throughput to 70.4 tokens/s, reduces TTFT to 2.06 seconds, and lowers peak KV memory to 6.2 GB, achieving a 3.9x effective compression ratio.

papers.title_zh: FreqDepthKV：用于长上下文大语言模型推理中稳健 KV Cache 压缩的频率引导深度共享
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究长上下文 LLM 推理中的 KV Cache 内存与带宽瓶颈，同时指出过强压缩会破坏检索和多步推理所需的层特异性证据。作者提出 FreqDepthKV，在推理时把相邻层的 KV 状态分解为共享的低频深度分量和稀疏高频残差。方法还通过轻量在线探针按头选择共享、残差或精确保留模式，使压缩策略能随提示结构自适应变化而无需重新训练。
innovations: 提出基于频率引导的跨层 KV 分解方法，将相邻层状态拆分为共享低频分量与稀疏高频残差。
设计轻量在线探针，按注意力头对重建敏感性动态选择 shared-depth、residual-depth 或 exact cache 模式。
强调无需重训练即可在推理阶段自适应长上下文结构，实现更稳健的 KV 压缩。
面向检索、多步推理、摘要和代码生成等长上下文任务，兼顾缓存预算缩减与任务精度保持。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长上下文问答、长文检索、摘要生成和代码生成等受 KV Cache 内存与带宽限制的 LLM 推理场景，尤其适合希望在不改模型参数的前提下提升长上下文服务效率的系统。
papers.title_en: FreqDepthKV: Frequency-Guided Depth Sharing for Robust KV Cache Compression in Long-Context LLM Inference

papers.title: AVA-VLM: Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model for In-the-Wild Construction Site Monitoring
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are promising for construction-site monitoring, and recent construction-tailored VLMs have primarily adapted pretrained VLMs through direct QA-style fine-tuning from a single global image. We argue that this direct paradigm remains limited for in-the-wild deployment in terms of operational range, reliability under reduced-resolution inputs, and inference efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose AVA-VLM, an Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model that follows a human-inspired coarse-to-fine reasoning strategy. AVA-VLM first reasons over a low-resolution global image and selectively requests a high-resolution local crop only when detailed inspection is needed, similar to how a human inspector zooms in on hard-to-see yet important areas. We further introduce a region-aware Chain-of-Thought dataset that teaches the model when to inspect, where to crop, and how to use local evidence. Experiments show that AVA-VLM improves reliability under long-distance and reduced-resolution conditions while substantially reducing visual-token usage.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 AVA-VLM，用于真实施工现场监测中的视觉语言理解。它采用类似人类检查员的粗到细策略，先在低分辨率全局图像上推理，只在必要时请求高分辨率局部裁剪进行细查。作者还构建了区域感知的思维链数据集，教模型决定何时检查、检查哪里以及如何利用局部证据。论文表明，该方法在远距离和低分辨率条件下更可靠，同时减少视觉 token 使用。
innovations: 提出面向施工现场监测的粗到细视觉推理框架，按需触发高分辨率局部检查。
通过自适应视觉注意机制，将全局低分辨率推理与局部高分辨率细查结合起来。
引入区域感知的 Chain-of-Thought 数据集，用于学习检查时机、裁剪位置和证据使用方式。
在提升复杂真实场景可靠性的同时，显式关注视觉 token 使用效率。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向真实施工现场的安全巡检、状态监测和远距离视觉问答等任务，尤其适合输入分辨率受限、目标细节难以直接辨认、同时又需要控制推理成本的场景。
papers.title_en: AVA-VLM: Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model for In-the-Wild Construction Site Monitoring

papers.title: Akashic: A Low-Overhead LLM Inference Service with MemAttention
papers.abstract: Recent LLM-based agent systems continuously accumulate context across multi-turn interactions, tool invocations, and cross-session workflows. Replaying the full history for every request quickly becomes impractical: long contexts increase prefill cost, may exceed context limits, and often bury task-relevant evidence in irrelevant content, degrading both serving efficiency and output quality. We propose Akashic, a low-overhead memory system built around MemAttention, which organizes context into bounded chunks and models semantic relationships across chunks, preserving cross-chunk evidence without repeatedly rewriting the full history. Akashic further applies hardware-software co-designed memory placement to co-locate likely co-retrieved chunks, reducing retrieval fragmentation and I/O overhead. Across four representative workloads and three model sizes, Akashic improves task accuracy by up to 10.2 points, throughput by up to 1.21x, and sustainable request rate by up to 1.88x over strong prior memory baselines.

papers.title_zh: Akashic：一种采用 MemAttention 的低开销大语言模型推理服务
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注基于 LLM 的 Agent 系统在多轮交互、工具调用和跨会话流程中不断累积上下文后，完整重放历史会带来高昂预填充成本和质量下降的问题。作者提出 Akashic，这是一种围绕 MemAttention 构建的低开销记忆系统，通过把上下文组织为有界块并建模块间语义关系，保留跨块证据而不必反复重写全部历史。系统还结合软硬件协同的内存放置策略，以减少检索碎片化和 I/O 开销。
innovations: 提出 MemAttention 机制，把长历史组织成有界上下文块并显式建模块间语义关联。
避免每次请求都重放完整历史，在保留跨块证据的同时降低预填充与上下文管理开销。
引入软硬件协同的记忆放置策略，将可能共同被检索的块尽量邻近放置，以降低碎片化和 I/O 成本。
同时面向任务效果与服务效率优化，服务于持续积累上下文的 Agent 工作负载。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于多轮对话 Agent、带工具调用的工作流 Agent 和跨会话记忆型 LLM 服务，尤其适合历史上下文持续增长、完整重放成本过高的在线推理系统。
papers.title_en: Akashic: A Low-Overhead LLM Inference Service with MemAttention

papers.title: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache Compression
papers.abstract: Long-context language model inference is increasingly limited by the memory bandwidth and capacity required to store key-value caches, yet existing compression methods often apply uniform budgets across layers or tokens and degrade retrieval when lexical cues and semantic states require different preservation. We introduce DepthWeave-KV, a token-adaptive cache compression method that factorizes key and value states across neighboring transformer layers using shared low-rank channel bases while retaining lightweight token-specific residuals where attention behavior is sensitive. DepthWeave-KV combines cross-depth residual factorization with a token-conditional depth router that allocates higher reconstruction rank to instruction-bearing and retrieval-critical tokens, and uses calibration-free online error tracking from attention-output probes to adapt compression during generation without retraining the base model. A fused CUDA implementation jointly performs basis lookup, residual dequantization, and attention projection to reduce decode-time memory traffic. Across LongBench, Needle-in-a-Haystack, L-Eval, and long-form QA and summarization benchmarks, DepthWeave-KV achieves near-full-cache task quality with substantially lower memory use, improving average score and retrieval accuracy over prior compressed caches while reaching 8.3x KV memory reduction and 72.8 tokens per second at 64K context.

We introduce DepthWeave-KV, a token-adaptive cache compression method that factorizes key and value states across neighboring transformer layers using shared low-rank channel bases while retaining lightweight token-specific residuals where attention behavior is sensitive. DepthWeave-KV combines cross-depth residual factorization with a token-conditional depth router that allocates higher reconstruction rank to instruction-bearing and retrieval-critical tokens, and uses calibration-free online error tracking from attention-output probes to adapt compression during generation without retraining the base model. papers.title_zh: DepthWeave-KV：面向长上下文 KV Cache 压缩的令牌自适应跨层残差分解
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种面向长上下文大语言模型推理的 KV Cache 压缩方法 DepthWeave-KV，目标是在尽量保持任务质量的同时显著降低缓存带来的显存与带宽压力。方法核心是跨相邻 Transformer 层对 key/value 状态进行共享低秩分解，并仅为注意力敏感的 token 保留轻量级残差。论文还引入基于 token 条件的深度路由与在线误差跟踪机制，使压缩强度可在生成过程中动态调整而无需重训基座模型。
innovations: 提出跨相邻 Transformer 层的残差分解式 KV 压缩，将共享低秩通道基与 token 特定残差结合起来建模缓存状态。
设计 token 条件深度路由器，对指令相关和检索关键 token 分配更高重建秩，实现非均匀、内容感知的压缩。
引入基于 attention 输出探针的免校准在线误差跟踪，使压缩策略可在生成时自适应调整且不需要重新训练基础模型。
实现融合式 CUDA 路径，将基查找、残差反量化与注意力投影联合执行，以降低解码阶段内存访问开销。
papers.scenario_cn: 用于长上下文大模型推理中的 KV Cache 压缩，适合长文问答、长文本摘要、检索增强生成以及需要高上下文长度但受显存和带宽限制的在线推理场景。
papers.title_en: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache Compression

papers.title: Invariant-domain-preserving limiting with Adaptive Mesh Refinement for Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto Discontinuous Galerkin Spectral Element Methods
papers.abstract: We present an invariant-domain-preserving (IDP) treatment of nonconforming interfaces for Legendre--Gauss--Lobatto Discontinuous Galerkin Spectral Element Methods (LGL-DGSEM) with adaptive mesh refinement (AMR) on Cartesian meshes. The proposed methodology extends recently developed convex limiting and graph-viscosity frameworks for DGSEM to meshes containing hanging nodes. Starting from a conservative mortar formulation, we derive low-order interface fluxes that satisfy the requirements of invariant-domain-preserving discretizations. To avoid the excessive diffusion associated with fully connected mortar couplings, a sparsification strategy based on LGL subcell characteristic functions is introduced, yielding compact interface stencils. The resulting mortar fluxes remain conservative, reduce to the standard conforming formulation on matching interfaces, and naturally fit into graph-viscosity-based low-order schemes used for convex limiting. The proposed construction provides the missing ingredient required to combine high-order DGSEM discretizations, invariant-domain-preserving limiting, and adaptive mesh refinement within a unified framework for nonlinear hyperbolic conservation laws. We provide numerical verifications of the properties of the proposed scheme and run challenging simulations that require positivity limiting and shock-capturing.

papers.title_zh: 用于 Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto 间断 Galerkin 谱元方法的结合自适应网格细化的不变域保持限制器
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究带自适应网格细化的 Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto 间断 Galerkin 谱元方法，重点解决非一致接口上的不变域保持问题。作者从保守的 mortar 公式出发，构造满足不变域保持要求的低阶界面通量，并将其与凸限制和图黏性框架结合。论文还提出稀疏化策略以减轻全连接 mortar 耦合带来的过度扩散，使高阶离散、限制器与 AMR 能在统一框架下协同工作。
innovations: 针对含 hanging nodes 的 AMR 笛卡尔网格，提出非一致接口上的不变域保持处理方法。
从保守 mortar 公式推导满足不变域保持离散要求的低阶界面通量。
基于 LGL 子单元特征函数提出界面耦合稀疏化策略，以获得更紧凑的界面模板并缓解过度扩散。
将高阶 DGSEM、不变域保持限制和自适应网格细化统一到同一非线性双曲守恒律求解框架中。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于求解非线性双曲守恒律，尤其是在存在激波、正性约束和局部细网格需求的数值模拟场景，如需要高阶精度且必须稳定处理非一致网格接口的问题。
papers.title_en: Invariant-domain-preserving limiting with Adaptive Mesh Refinement for Legendre-Gauss-Lobatto Discontinuous Galerkin Spectral Element Methods

papers.title: Bridging Diffusion Pruning and Step Distillation with Teacher-Aligned Repair
papers.abstract: Diffusion models generate high-quality images, but their inference cost comes from two sources: large denoising networks and repeated denoising steps. Existing compression pipelines usually attack these costs separately. Pruning reduces the network, but most pruning methods still rely on a long post-pruning retraining stage to recover a many-step sampler. Step distillation reduces the number of denoising steps, but it usually assumes a student that can already follow the teacher well enough to receive useful distillation gradients. This paper asks whether post-pruning retraining can be replaced by step distillation. We find that the direct replacement fails: after pruning an EDM2-XS teacher, starting SiDA from the pruned checkpoint produces unusable samples. We introduce a short teacher-alignment repair stage as a bridge between pruning and step distillation. The bridge matches the pruned generator to the teacher on noisy real-image latents, then hands the repaired checkpoint to one-step distillation. On ImageNet-512, the original EDM2-XS baseline uses 124.713M parameters and 63 network evaluations, reaching an FID of 3.53. With a suitable distillation objective, our 20% pruned one-step generator uses 98.826M parameters and one network evaluation, reaching an FID of 3.12. With 30% pruning, the model uses 88.029M parameters and one network evaluation, with an FID of 4.26.

papers.title_zh: 用教师对齐修复衔接扩散模型剪枝与步数蒸馏
papers.institution: 机构信息未解析到
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何同时降低扩散模型的两类推理开销：去噪网络本身的规模，以及采样时反复去噪的步数。作者发现，把剪枝后的模型直接拿去做步数蒸馏会失败，因此提出一个短暂的“教师对齐修复”阶段，先让剪枝后的生成器在带噪真实图像潜变量上重新贴近教师模型，再进行一步蒸馏。论文核心结论是，剪枝与一步蒸馏之间需要一个过渡桥接过程，否则学生模型很难获得有效蒸馏信号。
innovations: 提出 Teacher-Aligned Repair，将其作为网络剪枝与步数蒸馏之间的桥接阶段，而不是把二者直接串联。
指出“剪枝后直接做一步蒸馏”这一常见直觉在扩散模型中会失效，并给出失败现象作为方法设计动机。
修复阶段不是直接恢复多步采样器，而是通过对齐教师在带噪真实图像潜变量上的行为，为后续一步蒸馏提供可学习的初始化。
从方法框架上尝试用步数蒸馏替代传统剪枝后的长时间再训练流程，统一处理模型规模压缩与采样步数压缩。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向扩散图像生成模型推理成本过高的问题，适用于既想缩小模型参数量、又想显著减少采样步数的压缩部署场景，尤其适合需要把高质量扩散生成器做高效推理改造的研究与工程场景。
papers.title_en: Bridging Diffusion Pruning and Step Distillation with Teacher-Aligned Repair

papers.title: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation
papers.abstract: Traffic signs are crucial components of road safety, serving as visual tools under all lighting conditions. The Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (MUTCD) specifies daytime visual factors such as legibility and color contrast, and nighttime retroreflectivity requirements. Traditional assessment methods rely on manual inspections, which the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) notes are subjective, labor-intensive and pose safety concerns, while retroreflectometers are expensive and unaffordable for smaller agencies. Most existing studies focus on either daytime factors or nighttime retroreflectivity but rarely integrate both aspects comprehensively. This study develops a novel framework that systematically evaluates traffic signs through integrated daytime-nighttime assessment. The methodology employs three fine-tuned Vision Language Models (VLMs) for daytime visual performance assessment across four key factors: legibility, color, surface and shape integrity, and surrounding environment conditions. VLM predictions are converted to numerical scores through sentiment analysis and Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) scoring, while nighttime performance is assessed using LiDAR-derived retroreflectivity following established calibration procedures. The framework integrates these components into a comprehensive Sign Condition Index (SCI) for maintenance guidance. Evaluation results demonstrated that LLaVA and Qwen outperformed InternVL, achieving bidirectional cosine similarity scores of 0.67-0.76 across all factors. Among 462 validated traffic signs, 68 were flagged by the proposed framework as requiring immediate replacement due to inadequate retroreflectivity performance. This research provides a cost-effective alternative to traditional manual inspections for comprehensive traffic sign condition assessment.

The methodology employs three fine-tuned Vision Language Models (VLMs) for daytime visual performance assessment across four key factors: legibility, color, surface and shape integrity, and surrounding environment conditions. VLM predictions are converted to numerical scores through sentiment analysis and Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) scoring, while nighttime performance is assessed using LiDAR-derived retroreflectivity following established calibration procedures. The framework integrates these components into a comprehensive Sign Condition Index (SCI) for maintenance guidance. Evaluation results demonstrated that LLaVA and Qwen outperformed InternVL, achieving bidirectional cosine similarity scores of 0.67-0.76 across all factors. Among 462 validated traffic signs, 68 were flagged by the proposed framework as requiring immediate replacement due to inadequate retroreflectivity performance. This research provides a cost-effective alternative to traditional manual inspections for comprehensive traffic sign condition assessment. Comments: 21 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Preprint. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一个面向交通标志状态评估的综合框架，把白天视觉表现和夜间逆反射性能纳入同一体系。方法中使用三个微调后的视觉语言模型评估白天的可辨识性、颜色、表面与形状完整性以及周边环境，并结合 LiDAR 推导的夜间逆反射结果进行综合判断。作者进一步将这些结果整合为统一的标志状态指数，用于维护决策。论文强调，该框架为传统人工巡检提供了一种更低成本的替代方案。
innovations: 将交通标志白天视觉质量评估与夜间逆反射评估统一到同一综合框架中。
利用多个微调视觉语言模型对多个白天视觉因素进行系统化评估。
把 VLM 输出通过情感分析和 CLIP 打分转换为数值化指标，便于统一融合。
引入综合 Sign Condition Index 作为维护指导依据，实现昼夜多源信息集成。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于道路交通设施巡检、资产管理与养护决策等场景，尤其适合预算有限、难以大规模依赖人工检查和昂贵专用设备的交通管理部门。
papers.title_en: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation

papers.title: Analysis-by-Proxy: Localization Signals in VLMs Operating as Condition Encoders
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly utilized as the conditioning backbone for diffusion-based image editing due to their remarkable multimodal reasoning capabilities. While standalone VLMs demonstrate strong localization capabilities, editing pipelines frequently struggle to maintain this accuracy, particularly in complex, multi-entity scenes. In this work, we investigate this performance gap, hypothesizing that it stems from treating the VLM as a condition encoder. In this role, the model is restricted to a single forward pass, preventing the autoregressive generation process for which it was optimized, thereby failing to fully expose its capabilities. To investigate whether this spatial understanding persists when the VLM is used as a condition encoder, we introduce Analysis-by-Proxy. In this framework, we train a lightweight, interpretable proxy model on the VLM's intermediate representations using an auxiliary localization task. By analyzing the VLM through this proxy, we uncover the specific VLM representations that encode localization information. Our findings expose a fundamental mismatch between how spatial knowledge is represented within a VLM condition encoder and how it is extracted by current editing pipelines. We reveal that under single-pass constraints, the localization signal does not reliably propagate to the predefined layer configurations commonly used for conditioning. Instead, this crucial signal remains hidden within intermediate representations, at locations that vary depending on the input prompt. Using our introduced Analysis-by-Proxy framework, we reveal the fundamental failures of existing condition extraction strategies in editing pipelines, opening the door to more principled design of conditioning architectures.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究视觉语言模型在扩散式图像编辑中作为条件编码器使用时，为什么会丢失原本较强的定位能力。作者提出 Analysis-by-Proxy 框架，在视觉语言模型的中间表征上训练一个轻量、可解释的代理模型，用辅助定位任务分析空间信息究竟存在哪里。结果表明，现有编辑流水线提取条件信号的方式与视觉语言模型内部表征定位知识的方式存在错配。
innovations: 提出 Analysis-by-Proxy 分析框架，用可解释代理模型探测 VLM 中间表征里的定位信息。
揭示 VLM 作为单次前向的条件编码器时，其空间定位信号往往不会稳定传播到常用的预设条件层。
指出定位信号会隐藏在随输入提示而变化的中间表示位置中，而非被现有编辑管线稳定提取。
从机制层面解释了图像编辑系统中 VLM 定位能力下降的根本原因，为更合理的条件架构设计提供依据。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向基于扩散模型的图像编辑与多实体复杂场景编辑，主要解决“VLM 本身会定位，但接入编辑管线后定位失准”的问题。适用于研究多模态条件注入、空间控制和可解释分析的图像编辑系统。
papers.title_en: Analysis-by-Proxy: Localization Signals in VLMs Operating as Condition Encoders

papers.title: EgoPolice: A Benchmark for Egocentric Video Understanding in High-Stakes Police Body-Worn Camera Footage
papers.abstract: We introduce EgoPolice, a carefully curated dataset of real, egocentric police-civilian interactions, sourced from publicly available body-worn camera videos. We select police-civilian action labels that are critical for police behavioral research and annotate them at a second-by-second granularity. The videos feature rapid and irregular camera motion, dense human interactions, and rare high-stakes events, making the dataset a challenging benchmark for motion-robust and context-aware egocentric perception. We provide two different tasks, classification and multiple-choice question-answering, and benchmark both open-source and closed-source models. We find that even the best video models like Gemini 2.5 Pro still struggle to accurately predict high-risk actions such as "Weapon Out". Beyond serving as a benchmark, EgoPolice provides a foundation for developing models capable of identifying events of interest in large-scale body-worn camera video repositories, enabling more efficient downstream human review.

papers.content_snippet: We introduce EgoPolice, a carefully curated dataset of real, egocentric police-civilian interactions, sourced from publicly available body-worn camera videos. We select police-civilian action labels that are critical for police behavioral research and annotate them at a second-by-second granularity. The videos feature rapid and irregular camera motion, dense human interactions, and rare high-stakes events, making the dataset a challenging benchmark for motion-robust and context-aware egocentric perception. We provide two different tasks, classification and multiple-choice question-answering, and benchmark both open-source and closed-source models. We find that even the best video models like Gemini 2.5 Pro still struggle to accurately predict high-risk actions such as "Weapon Out". Beyond serving as a benchmark, EgoPolice provides a foundation for developing models capable of identifying events of interest in large-scale body-worn camera video repositories, enabling more efficient downstream human review.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 EgoPolice，一个基于真实警民互动随身摄像头视频构建的第一视角视频理解数据集与基准。数据按秒级标注对警务行为研究关键的动作标签，并设置分类和多项选择问答两类任务。基准测试显示，即使是强视频模型，在识别高风险动作时仍然表现吃力。
innovations: 构建了来源于公开警用随身摄像头视频的真实第一视角高风险场景数据集。
提供秒级细粒度动作标注，覆盖对警务行为研究重要的警民互动事件。
同时定义分类与多项选择问答两类任务，形成更完整的视频理解评测框架。
揭示当前开源和闭源视频模型在高风险动作识别上的明显能力缺口。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要用于高风险执法场景中的第一视角视频理解评测，解决现有基准难以覆盖剧烈运动、密集交互和稀有关键事件的问题。适用于警用视频检索、事件发现和人工复核辅助等场景。
papers.title_en: EgoPolice: A Benchmark for Egocentric Video Understanding in High-Stakes Police Body-Worn Camera Footage

papers.title: HoloCount: A Holistic Visual Counting Benchmark for MLLMs
papers.abstract: Visual counting is a fundamental pillar of multimodal intelligence, requiring a seamless integration of fine-grained grounding and spatial reasoning. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in qualitative scene understanding, their quantitative precision remains a significant bottleneck, often characterized by persistent numerical hallucinations. Existing counting benchmarks primarily focus on basic perception in simplified contexts, failing to capture the complex failure modes that emerge under logical constraints or adversarial conditions. To address these limitations, we introduce HoloCount, a holistic and diagnostically rich benchmark structured around a three-level hierarchical taxonomy. HoloCount evaluates MLLMs across: (1) Semantic Counting, focusing on atomic and property-based enumeration; (2) Analytical Counting, assessing logical composition through spatial and set-based reasoning; and (3) Robustness Testing, probing model integrity against adverse scenarios and grounded counter-priors, such as high-density scenes and linguistic biases. Through an exhaustive evaluation of over 20 state-of-the-art MLLMs, we reveal a critical performance gap: even top-tier models degrade significantly as tasks transition from perception to complex analytical reasoning and adverse scenarios. Our findings provide a systematic landscape of current MLLM counting capabilities and offer a roadmap for developing more grounded and reliable multimodal systems. The dataset is available at this https URL .

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 HoloCount，一个面向多模态大语言模型的系统化视觉计数评测基准。作者将计数能力划分为语义计数、分析性计数和鲁棒性测试三个层次，用于检验模型在复杂逻辑约束和对抗条件下的数量理解能力。评测结果表明，当前强模型在从基础感知过渡到复杂分析推理和不利场景时性能会明显下降。
innovations: 提出三层级层次化计数评测体系，覆盖语义计数、分析性计数与鲁棒性测试。
把逻辑组合、空间推理、集合推理以及高密度场景和语言偏置等失败模式纳入统一基准。
对二十多个先进 MLLM 做系统评测，刻画其从感知到分析推理阶段的能力退化。
为构建更可靠、具备 grounded 计数能力的多模态系统提供了诊断式评测路线图。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决现有视觉计数基准过于简单、难以暴露多模态模型数值幻觉与复杂推理短板的问题。适用于 MLLM 的视觉计数评测、鲁棒性分析和多模态推理能力诊断。
papers.title_en: HoloCount: A Holistic Visual Counting Benchmark for MLLMs

papers.title: Load Balancing under Adaptive Bin Deletions
papers.abstract: We analyze a balls-and-bins game against an adaptive adversary that sequentially deletes bins. Starting with $n$ balls distributed across $n$ bins, the adversary deletes a bin in each step, forcing the algorithm to redistribute its balls to surviving bins. We prove that after $n/2$ rounds, uniform random redistribution yields optimal $O(n)$ recourse and $O(\frac{\log n}{\log \log n})$ maximum load. Furthermore, we show that applying the ``power of two choices'' reduces the maximum load to $O(\log \log n)$ while maintaining linear recourse. We also consider a variation of this game where the balls from the deleted bin are partitioned evenly among $d \ll n$ random bins rather than being redistributed independently. We demonstrate that keeping the balls together ($d=1$), which gives small maximum load and recourse against an oblivious adversary, fails against an adaptive adversary. Nevertheless, we show that splitting the balls into just two groups ($d=2$) is sufficient to recover linear recourse and efficient load balancing in the adaptive setting.

We also consider a variation of this game where the balls from the deleted bin are partitioned evenly among $d \ll n$ random bins rather than being redistributed independently. We demonstrate that keeping the balls together ($d=1$), which gives small maximum load and recourse against an oblivious adversary, fails against an adaptive adversary. Nevertheless, we show that splitting the balls into just two groups ($d=2$) is sufficient to recover linear recourse and efficient load balancing in the adaptive setting. papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究一个带有自适应对手的 balls-and-bins 负载均衡问题：系统从 n 个桶开始，对手每一步删除一个桶，算法需要把被删桶中的球重新分配到剩余桶中。作者分析了不同重分配策略下的迁移代价与最大负载，并证明均匀随机重分配可达到线性级别的总迁移代价。进一步地，论文表明“二选一”策略可以在保持线性迁移代价的同时，把最大负载进一步降低。作者还研究了把被删桶中的球按组分配给少量随机桶的变体，并说明在自适应对手下至少需要适当拆分才能恢复良好的性能。
innovations: 提出并分析了“自适应删桶”下的动态负载均衡模型，把桶删除与重分配过程纳入统一理论框架。
证明均匀随机重分配在经历 n/2 轮删除后可实现最优量级的线性迁移代价与对数级最大负载。
证明采用 power of two choices 可以在保持线性迁移代价的同时，把最大负载降到更低的数量级。
分析分组重分配变体，指出 d=1 在自适应对手下失效，而 d=2 已足以恢复线性迁移代价和高效负载均衡。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究动态资源池、服务器下线、节点失效或容器撤销等场景中的在线负载均衡问题。它主要解决系统在资源不断减少且对手可根据当前状态做出删除决策时，如何控制迁移开销并避免局部过载。
papers.title_en: Load Balancing under Adaptive Bin Deletions

papers.title: MonoIR-RS: Infrared Remote Sensing Vision-Language Learning with CLIP and VLM Adaptation
papers.abstract: Infrared remote-sensing imagery captures intensity structure, object-background contrast, and illumination-invariant cues often invisible in RGB imagery. Yet, most remote-sensing vision-language resources and models focus on visible-band semantics, leaving infrared vision-language understanding underexplored. We introduce MonoIR-RS, a large-scale infrared remote-sensing vision-language dataset and benchmark that couples IR-aware data construction with CLIP-style contrastive adaptation and VLM instruction tuning. Built from the same source pool and split as FusionRS, MonoIR-RS retains the infrared image as the model-facing modality, yielding 600,000 synthesized infrared images and 59,032 retained IR-aware caption records. The model experiments use this retained language-supervision subset, whose captions rewrite supervision around grayscale structure and infrared-style contrast instead of RGB appearance. We show that the synthesized infrared imagery is markedly closer to real thermal imagery than a grayscale conversion on the AVIID benchmark. We fine-tune five CLIP backbones and six VLM backbones, and calibrate them against zero-shot behavior: IR-aware adaptation lifts CLIP mean recall by up to 12.8 points and drives VLM captioning IR-cue coverage to 100% while reducing residual RGB-color leakage to near zero. By isolating the infrared modality from RGB-IR dual-modal learning, MonoIR-RS offers a controlled, reproducible testbed for aligning infrared remote-sensing evidence with language.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文聚焦红外遥感场景下的视觉语言学习，指出现有资源与模型过度偏向可见光语义，导致红外理解不足。作者提出 MonoIR-RS 数据集与基准，并结合 CLIP 风格对比适配和 VLM 指令微调，让模型直接面向红外模态学习语言对齐。实验表明，这种 IR-aware 适配能提升检索与描述中的红外线索覆盖，并减少把红外图像误按 RGB 颜色语义理解的问题。
innovations: 提出大规模红外遥感视觉语言数据集与基准，专门面向红外模态而非可见光语义。
采用 IR-aware 数据构建方式，将文本监督重写为围绕灰度结构与红外对比特征的描述。
结合 CLIP 式对比适配与 VLM 指令微调，系统研究红外模态与语言的对齐。
通过隔离红外单模态学习，构建了可控、可复现的红外视觉语言研究测试平台。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决红外遥感图像缺少高质量视觉语言资源、现有模型容易带入 RGB 偏见的问题。适用于红外遥感检索、红外图像描述以及红外遥感多模态理解与评测场景。
papers.title_en: MonoIR-RS: Infrared Remote Sensing Vision-Language Learning with CLIP and VLM Adaptation

papers.title: Propose and Attend: Training-free MLLM Grounding Confidence via Multi-Token Localized Attention
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models can emit localized predictions, bounding boxes for objects and temporal windows for video and audio events, but they hallucinate these regions prolifically. The model's own token log-probabilities are nearly uninformative: they conflate grounding quality with input ambiguity, and coordinate tokens become near-deterministic once the model commits. We propose Multi-Token Localized Attention (MTLA): a training-free, post-hoc score that measures how strongly a prediction's tokens attend to the region they claim. Prior attention-based detectors, which sum attention over the entire input modality and read a single response token, are weaker special cases; we show that summing only within the claimed region and aggregating across all prediction tokens recovers a stronger grounding signal. The same recipe applies almost trivially to other modalities and tasks: object detection in images and temporal localization in video and audio. Across multiple MLLM families and three modalities, MTLA improves hallucination AUROC by +7 to +38 over the best prior training-free baseline. Used as a confidence score for re-ranking, it nearly doubles the zero-shot COCO detection AP of an open-source 8B generalist (from 20.4 to 37.0), narrowing the gap to supervised detectors without any task-specific training.

papers.title_zh: Propose and Attend：通过多标记局部注意力实现免训练多模态大语言模型定位置信度估计
papers.institution: 未明确提取
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注多模态大语言模型在输出图像框、视频时间窗或音频事件区间时容易产生定位幻觉的问题。作者提出一种免训练、事后计算的置信度评分方法 MTLA，用预测相关 token 对其所声明区域的注意力强度来衡量 grounding 质量。该方法可用于图像目标检测以及视频、音频中的时序定位，并作为重排序信号提升零样本定位效果。
innovations: 提出 Multi-Token Localized Attention（MTLA），无需额外训练即可对多模态定位结果进行置信度估计。
不同于以往对整段输入模态求和、只读取单个响应 token 的做法，MTLA只在声明区域内聚合注意力，并跨全部预测 token 汇总信号。
将同一套注意力置信度计算方式统一推广到图像、视频和音频三种模态的定位任务。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于多模态大语言模型执行目标框选、视频片段定位、音频事件定位等任务时的结果筛选与重排序，尤其适合需要抑制定位幻觉、提升零样本 grounding 可靠性的场景。
papers.title_en: Propose and Attend: Training-free MLLM Grounding Confidence via Multi-Token Localized Attention

papers.title: SAMPLe: SAM-based Optimizer for Prompt Learning in VLMs
papers.abstract: Pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like CLIP have proven highly effective as foundation models for various downstream applications. However, prompt learning in VLMs encounters a performance-generalization dilemma: while prompts can be tuned to achieve high accuracy on seen distributions, this tuning process often undermines their generalizability to unseen data. The limited set of learnable prompts, which contextualize and condition the input to steer it toward the task within the pretrained VLM, tends to overfit the training data, leading to a trade-off between task-specific performance and preserving generalization. To address this dilemma, we introduce SAMPLe (Sharpness-Aware Minimization Prompt Learning), a plug-in sharpness-aware optimizer that enhances prompt generalizability by accounting for loss landscape sharpness. Unlike conventional methods, SAMPLe balances exploration and exploitation by satisfying objective function constraints at each step, dynamically adapting to the current optimization state based on the local curvature and gradient properties. This approach reduces overfitting on seen distributions and improves adaptability to unseen data, preserving the generalization potential of pre-trained VLM models. We integrate SAMPLe into multiple prompt learning frameworks, including CoOp, CoCoOp, MaPLe, TCP, and Co-Prompt, demonstrating its effectiveness across diverse methods. Experiments show that SAMPLe elevates prompt learning frameworks and consistently outperforms existing optimizers across diverse settings, establishing itself as a robust, model-agnostic solution for prompt learning.

papers.title: Bridging Physical Reasoning and Task Generalization via Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to generalize in interactive physical reasoning, particularly under unseen tasks and environments. Two key failure modes are prominent: hallucinated chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that contradicts physical reality, and misalignment between the model's reasoning and actions. We present VAORA (Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment), a novel reward design that directly addresses both issues. VAORA introduces two complementary rewards: Visual Alignment Reward, which anchors VLM reasoning to the visual context independent of the agent action itself, and Visual-Action Alignment Reward, which grounds reasoning in the visual outcome induced by the model's action. Together, these rewards suppress hallucinated CoT and reduce the gap between reasoning and behavior. To improve training stability, we further employ smooth, dense rewards by estimating success probabilities using a pre-trained in-domain expert agent. Experiments on PHYRE and Virtual Tool support our performances across novel-task and unseen-environment settings, confirming that grounded and generalizable physical intelligence can be induced through VAORA.
