papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注视觉语言模型在交互式物理推理中的泛化问题，指出其在未见任务和新环境下常出现两类失败：推理链脱离物理现实，以及推理与动作结果不一致。作者提出 VAORA，一种面向该问题的奖励设计，通过视觉对齐奖励和视觉-动作对齐奖励来约束模型推理。前者要求推理锚定当前视觉上下文，后者要求推理与模型动作导致的视觉结果一致。论文还利用预训练领域专家估计成功概率，构造更平滑、更稠密的奖励以提升训练稳定性。
innovations: 提出 VAORA 奖励设计，同时针对“推理脱离视觉现实”和“推理与动作不一致”两类关键失败模式。
设计 Visual Alignment Reward，使模型推理受当前视觉上下文约束，而不是仅依赖语言链式推理。
设计 Visual-Action Alignment Reward，把推理与动作引发的视觉结果显式绑定，缩小 reasoning 与 behavior 的差距。
通过预训练领域专家估计成功概率，构造平滑且稠密的奖励以提升训练稳定性与泛化能力。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要视觉理解、动作决策和结果反馈闭环的交互式物理推理任务，如物理环境中的操作规划、工具使用和具身智能决策。它主要解决模型在新任务或新环境中出现的物理常识幻觉以及推理和执行脱节问题。
papers.title_en: Bridging Physical Reasoning and Task Generalization via Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment

papers.title: Clustered Codebook Quantization for 2D Gaussian-based Image Compression
papers.abstract: Gaussian-based image representations effectively model image content using compact parametric primitives while preserving high visual fidelity, yet storing a large number of floating-point parameters per primitive degrades rate-distortion efficiency at higher fidelity targets. To improve the rate-distortion performance in Gaussian representation, we present our Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization (CGVQ), a Gaussian primitive based image compression method. Our key idea is to partition Gaussian parameters further into homogeneous groups prior to quantization, enabling higher compression efficiency and accurate parameter reconstruction. In practice, our extensive experiments show that CGVQ decreases the bpp by 20% with respect to our baseline, while maintaining on-par visual quality

papers.title_zh: 面向二维高斯图像压缩的聚类码本量化
papers.institution: 机构信息未解析到
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注基于高斯原语的图像表示在高保真压缩目标下，因每个原语需要存储较多浮点参数而导致码率效率下降的问题。作者提出 Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization（CGVQ），先把高斯参数划分为更同质的若干组，再分别做量化，以提升压缩效率并保持参数重建精度。整体上，这是一种针对高斯表示图像压缩的结构化量化方法。
innovations: 提出 CGVQ，将聚类分组与向量量化结合，用于二维高斯图像压缩。
核心设计是在量化前先对高斯参数做同质化分组，而不是把所有参数统一量化。
方法目标不仅是降低存储开销，还强调在压缩后保持较准确的高斯参数重建。
把码率失真优化问题具体落到高斯原语参数组织方式上，而不是仅依赖通用量化策略。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决高斯原语图像表示在高画质目标下参数存储开销偏大的问题，适用于基于二维高斯表示的图像压缩、图像存储与传输等场景，尤其适合希望在视觉质量基本不变前提下降低比特率的系统。
papers.title_en: Clustered Codebook Quantization for 2D Gaussian-based Image Compression

papers.title: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail
papers.abstract: Large language models deployed in open-world applications require safety guardrails that are both robust to complex risks and efficient enough for low-latency runtime moderation. Existing guardrails face a practical trade-off between lightweight classification-based models, which are efficient but often struggle with concealed intent, ambiguous semantics, and borderline safety decisions, and reasoning-based guards, which improve judgment quality but introduce additional token generation and inference latency. We present DT-Guard, a content safety guardrail model based on a Reasoning-Active Training, Reasoning-Free Inference paradigm. The key idea is to use reasoning supervision during training while emitting only structured safety labels at inference time. DT-Guard formulates safety judgment as a progressive decision process, Intent - Category - Safety, and constructs an intent-driven dataset with intent labels, risk categories, safety labels, and structured reasoning trajectories. To further improve hard-case robustness, we propose Rollout-Guided Progressive Hard-Case Optimization (RG-PHO), which uses multi-rollout consistency to identify stably mastered, persistently failed, and preference-unstable samples, and applies targeted supervised and preference optimization accordingly. At inference time, DT-Guard directly generates structured labels without explicit reasoning traces, preserving deployment efficiency. Experiments on prompt-side and response-side safety benchmarks show that DT-Guard achieves average F1 scores of 0.886 and 0.870, respectively. With only a 4B backbone, it reaches a dual-side average F1 of 0.878, outperforming strong 8B guardrail baselines. These results demonstrate that reasoning supervision can be effectively internalized into low-latency safety discrimination.

Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2607.06326 (cs) [Submitted on 7 Jul 2026] Title: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail Authors: He Liu , Changtao Miao , Xinjie Yang , Tianle Song , Yin Wu , Junchi Chen , Bintao He , Xinyuan Zhang , Bo Zhang , Shi Yan , Wei Lu , Wei Wang , Danyang Xu , Jiansheng Cai , Zhe Li View a PDF of the paper titled DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail, by He Liu and 14 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Large language models deployed in open-world applications require safety guardrails that are both robust to complex risks and efficient enough for low-latency runtime moderation. Existing guardrails face a practical trade-off between lightweight classification-based models, which are efficient but often struggle with concealed intent, ambiguous semantics, and borderline safety decisions, and reasoning-based guards, which improve judgment quality but introduce additional token generation and inference latency. We present DT-Guard, a content safety guardrail model based on a Reasoning-Active Training, Reasoning-Free Inference paradigm. The key idea is to use reasoning supervision during training while emitting only structured safety labels at inference time. DT-Guard formulates safety judgment as a progressive decision process, Intent - Category - Safety, and constructs an intent-driven dataset with intent labels, risk categories, safety labels, and structured reasoning trajectories. To further improve hard-case robustness, we propose Rollout-Guided Progressive Hard-Case Optimization (RG-PHO), which uses multi-rollout consistency to identify stably mastered, persistently failed, and preference-unstable samples, and applies targeted supervised and preference optimization accordingly. At inference time, DT-Guard directly generates structured labels without explicit reasoning traces, preserving deployment efficiency. Experiments on prompt-side and response-side safety benchmarks show that DT-Guard achieves average F1 scores of 0.886 and 0.870, respectively. With only a 4B backbone, it reaches a dual-side average F1 of 0.878, outperforming strong 8B guardrail baselines. These results demonstrate that reasoning supervision can be effectively internalized into low-latency safety discrimination. papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 DT-Guard，一种面向开放场景内容安全的大语言模型护栏模型，目标是在保持低时延的同时提升复杂风险判断能力。其核心思想是“训练时激活推理、推断时不显式推理”，即在训练阶段使用推理监督，但在部署时只直接输出结构化安全标签。作者把安全判断建模为“意图-类别-安全”的渐进决策过程，并构建带有意图标签、风险类别、安全标签和结构化推理轨迹的数据集。为增强困难样本鲁棒性，论文还提出 RG-PHO，根据多次 rollout 的一致性对样本分型并施加针对性的优化。
innovations: 提出 Reasoning-Active Training, Reasoning-Free Inference 范式，在训练中利用推理监督、在推断中避免显式推理开销。
将安全判断形式化为 Intent-Category-Safety 的渐进决策流程，并围绕该流程构建意图驱动的数据表示。
提出 RG-PHO，通过多次 rollout 一致性区分已掌握、持续失败和偏好不稳定样本，并进行定向优化。
在仅输出结构化安全标签的低时延部署方式下，实现对隐含意图、语义歧义和边界案例更稳健的判别。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要在线低延迟安全审核的大语言模型应用，如用户提示词审查、模型回复审查和开放域内容风控。它主要解决传统轻量分类护栏难以识别隐藏意图、而显式推理护栏又带来额外推理成本的问题。
papers.title_en: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail

papers.title: Dynamic Evaluation of Classical and Control-Aware Optimal Trajectory Planning in Robot Manipulators
papers.abstract: Trajectory planning strongly influences tracking accuracy, actuator demand, and overall execution behavior in robotic manipulators. Classical planners such as cubic, quintic, and trapezoidal profiles are widely used for their simplicity and smoothness, yet they remain purely kinematic and ignore system dynamics and control effort during trajectory generation. As a result, nominally smooth trajectories can lead to inefficient nonlinear execution and increased corrective control action. This paper presents a control-aware optimal trajectory planning framework that explicitly incorporates manipulator dynamics and actuator effort within a finite-horizon formulation. A midpoint linearization strategy is introduced to improve approximation accuracy for large point-to-point motions. In contrast to prior comparisons, the proposed approach enables fair, isolated evaluation of trajectory generation effects under identical closed-loop nonlinear execution conditions. To this end, a unified evaluation framework is developed in which all planners are executed under identical nonlinear dynamics, controller structure, and actuator constraints. Simulations on a nonlinear simplified UR5 manipulator show that the proposed approach consistently reduces tracking error, corrective torque, and closed-loop execution cost compared to classical methods, achieving substantial reductions in actuator effort and execution cost across all evaluated scenarios, demonstrating that kinematic smoothness alone does not ensure dynamically efficient execution.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究机器人机械臂的轨迹规划问题，对比经典的三次、五次与梯形轨迹规划方法，以及一种显式考虑动力学与执行器控制代价的控制感知最优规划框架。作者在有限时域内将机械臂动力学和执行器努力纳入轨迹生成，并提出中点线性化策略以提升大范围点到点运动的近似精度。论文还构建了统一评估框架，在相同非线性动力学、控制器结构和执行器约束下公平比较不同规划器的闭环执行表现。
innovations: 提出控制感知的最优轨迹规划框架，在轨迹生成阶段显式建模机械臂动力学与执行器控制代价。
引入中点线性化策略，以提升大幅度点到点运动下的近似精度。
设计统一评测框架，在相同闭环非线性执行条件下隔离并比较不同轨迹生成方法的影响。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向机器人机械臂的点到点运动规划与闭环跟踪控制，适用于既关注轨迹平滑性、又关注跟踪误差、执行器负担与整体执行效率的工业或研究场景。
papers.title_en: Dynamic Evaluation of Classical and Control-Aware Optimal Trajectory Planning in Robot Manipulators

papers.title: EAGOR: Embodied Reasoning in Omni-direction
papers.abstract: Omni-directional (360°) cameras provide embodied agents with a holistic view of their surroundings, making them suited for directional reasoning in tasks such as navigation and object search. Existing Vision Language Models (VLMs) project 360° observations to 2D equirectangular projection (ERP) images and process them using architectures designed for perspective images. However, they ignore the spherical nature of 360° observations, where each pixel represents a viewing direction relative to the agent. Consequently, their direction estimates often become inconsistent under camera view transformations caused by agent motion. This limitation is particularly critical for map-free navigation, where the agent must continuously estimate the target direction in its egocentric frame. We propose EAGOR, a training-free, geometry-aware framework for embodied 360° directional reasoning. Instead of predicting target directions as ERP image coordinates, EAGOR formulates directional reasoning as recursive Bayesian estimation directly on the sphere. It maintains a continuous belief over target directions and propagates it equivariantly under agent motion without training the backbone VLMs. To achieve this, we introduce the Spherical Harmonic Belief Field (SH-BF), whose spherical harmonic representation provides a globally defined, rotation-aware basis for directional estimation on the spherical manifold. This formulation eliminates ERP seam discontinuities, latitude distortions, and interpolation errors. We evaluate EAGOR on two benchmark datasets and real-world experiments with a legged robot across directional reasoning tasks. EAGOR consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving average relative gains of +34.4% and +45.6% on HOS and OSR-Bench, respectively, while improving navigation success by +14.6%, reducing step count by 17.7%, and lowering mean angular error by 24.5%.

We propose EAGOR, a training-free, geometry-aware framework for embodied 360° directional reasoning. Instead of predicting target directions as ERP image coordinates, EAGOR formulates directional reasoning as recursive Bayesian estimation directly on the sphere. It maintains a continuous belief over target directions and propagates it equivariantly under agent motion without training the backbone VLMs. To achieve this, we introduce the Spherical Harmonic Belief Field (SH-BF), whose spherical harmonic representation provides a globally defined, rotation-aware basis for directional estimation on the spherical manifold. This formulation eliminates ERP seam discontinuities, latitude distortions, and interpolation errors. We evaluate EAGOR on two benchmark datasets and real-world experiments with a legged robot across directional reasoning tasks. EAGOR consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving average relative gains of +34.4% and +45.6% on HOS and OSR-Bench, respectively, while improving navigation success by +14.6%, reducing step count by 17.7%, and lowering mean angular error by 24.5%. papers.content_snippet: Omni-directional (360°) cameras provide embodied agents with a holistic view of their surroundings, making them suited for directional reasoning in tasks such as navigation and object search. Existing Vision Language Models (VLMs) project 360° observations to 2D equirectangular projection (ERP) images and process them using architectures designed for perspective images. However, they ignore the spherical nature of 360° observations, where each pixel represents a viewing direction relative to the agent. Consequently, their direction estimates often become inconsistent under camera view transformations caused by agent motion. This limitation is particularly critical for map-free navigation, where the agent must continuously estimate the target direction in its egocentric frame. We propose EAGOR, a training-free, geometry-aware framework for embodied 360° directional reasoning. Instead of predicting target directions as ERP image coordinates, EAGOR formulates directional reasoning as recursive Bayesian estimation directly on the sphere. It maintains a continuous belief over target directions and propagates it equivariantly under agent motion without training the backbone VLMs. To achieve this, we introduce the Spherical Harmonic Belief Field (SH-BF), whose spherical harmonic representation provides a globally defined, rotation-aware basis for directional estimation on the spherical manifold. This formulation eliminates ERP seam discontinuities, latitude distortions, and interpolation errors. We evaluate EAGOR on two benchmark datasets and real-world experiments with a legged robot across directional reasoning tasks. EAGOR consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving average relative gains of +34.4% and +45.6% on HOS and OSR-Bench, respectively, while improving navigation success by +14.6%, reducing step count by 17.7%, and lowering mean angular error by 24.5%.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文面向使用360°相机的具身智能体方向推理问题，指出现有视觉语言模型把全景观测投影为二维ERP图像后，会忽略球面几何结构，从而在智能体运动后产生不一致的方向估计。作者提出无需训练的几何感知框架 EAGOR，将目标方向推理表述为球面上的递归贝叶斯估计，并在智能体运动过程中保持对方向信念的连续更新。为此，论文进一步提出球谐信念场表示，以旋转感知的全局基底来建模球面方向分布。
innovations: 提出训练自由的 EAGOR 框架，直接在球面上而非ERP像素坐标中进行方向推理。
将方向估计建模为递归贝叶斯估计，可在智能体运动下等变传播目标方向信念。
提出球谐信念场（SH-BF），用球谐表示实现面向球面流形的全局、旋转感知方向建模。
该方法避免了ERP表示中的接缝不连续、纬度畸变与插值误差。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于基于360°视觉的具身导航、目标搜索与无地图导航等任务，尤其适合需要在运动过程中持续进行自中心方向估计的机器人场景。
papers.title_en: EAGOR: Embodied Reasoning in Omni-direction

papers.title: Estimating Uncertainty from Reasoning: A Large-Scale Study of Multi- and Crosslingual MCQA Performance in LLMs
papers.abstract: Uncertainty estimation (UE) enables LLM-powered systems to recognize when to abstain, yet existing research has predominantly focused on English. We present the first large-scale evaluation of UE methods across 22 languages, spanning high-, mid-, and low-resource settings. Using two human-curated Q\&A datasets, we compare open and closed box UE methods (nine in total) across different model sizes and architectures while eliciting long-form reasoning, avoiding LLM-as-a-judge and embedding-based scoring, which can introduce evaluation noise. We report three main actionable findings. First, we find that prompting models to reason in English while keeping questions in low-resource languages substantially improves UE performance, suggesting that comprehension of low-resource languages is largely intact, and that the reliability bottleneck lies in generation rather than understanding. Second, prompting models to reason in English closes the UE performance gap between low and high-resource languages, demonstrating that generation language matters more than the question language. Third, the choice of UE method should depend on model scale: at smaller scales, open-box probability-based methods outperform alternatives; at larger scales, closed-box self-verbalized uncertainty becomes superior. Finally, we provide an analysis of threshold selection for selective prediction, offering guidance on calibrating abstention in multilingual settings.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究大语言模型在多语言与跨语言多项选择问答中的不确定性估计问题，覆盖22种语言，并比较了九种开放盒与闭源盒不确定性估计方法。作者在诱导长链路推理的设定下开展评测，避免使用LLM-as-a-judge和基于嵌入的评分方式，以减少评估噪声。研究表明，在低资源语言问题上使用英文进行推理可显著提升不确定性估计表现，并缩小不同语言资源条件下的性能差距。
innovations: 开展首个覆盖22种语言的大规模多语言不确定性估计评测。
系统比较开放盒与闭源盒共九类不确定性估计方法，并分析其与模型规模的关系。
提出关键发现：生成语言比问题语言更影响不确定性估计效果，英文推理可改善低资源语言场景。
补充了选择性预测中的阈值选择分析，为多语言拒答校准提供实践指导。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于构建具备拒答能力的大语言模型问答系统、多语言问答服务与跨语言可靠性评估场景，尤其适合需要在低资源语言环境中进行风险控制与置信度校准的应用。
papers.title_en: Estimating Uncertainty from Reasoning: A Large-Scale Study of Multi- and Crosslingual MCQA Performance in LLMs

papers.title: SCOReD: Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) distillation in the recommendation domain is a necessary precursor to RL training, but raw teacher traces are ill-suited to this task. Large teachers approach the recommendation task with unusually high reasoning uncertainty, repeatedly rechecking their answers without revising them; supervised fine-tuning on such traces produces verbose students that never revise their initial guess. Furthermore, due to the novelty of the recommendation domain, the teacher's reasoning traces are highly out-of-distribution for the small student LLM. We propose Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation (SCOReD), a CoT optimization framework tailored to recommendation that first parses each teacher trace into typed segments and uses the student LLM's attention to score the importance of each segment. Then SCOReD dynamically selects a per-segment edit (KEEP / REWRITE / FUSE / PRUNE) based on the output length and comparative log probability lift of the answer given the edit as per the student. Therefore, SCOReD prunes redundant sections of the reasoning trace while preserving information-dense sections and adapts raw teacher traces to the student's output distribution. Training on SCOReD-optimized CoTs provides a cleaner learning signal to the student model and improves over baseline SFT by 1.56% NDCG and 1.9% Recall@5, while reducing reasoning length by 27.3%.

papers.title_zh: SCOReD：面向学生模型的推荐蒸馏思维链优化
papers.institution: 机构信息未解析到
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究推荐系统场景中的思维链蒸馏问题，指出大教师模型生成的原始推理轨迹往往冗长、反复确认且与小学生模型的分布不匹配。作者提出 SCOReD，先把教师推理轨迹解析成带类型的片段，再利用学生模型的注意力和答案对数概率变化来决定保留、改写、融合或裁剪各片段。其目标是把原始教师思维链加工成更适合学生模型学习的蒸馏数据。
innovations: 提出面向推荐蒸馏的 Student-Aware CoT Optimization，不直接使用原始教师思维链，而是先做学生感知式优化。
把教师推理轨迹解析为带类型的片段，并对片段重要性进行评分，形成结构化编辑对象。
设计了 KEEP、REWRITE、FUSE、PRUNE 四类动态编辑操作，根据输出长度与答案概率提升来选择编辑策略。
强调让蒸馏后的推理轨迹适配小学生模型的输出分布，而不是单纯保真复制教师推理过程。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决推荐系统中教师思维链冗长、噪声大且不适合小模型学习的问题，适用于推荐模型蒸馏、推荐领域小语言模型监督微调，以及为后续强化学习准备高质量推理数据的场景。
papers.title_en: SCOReD: Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation

papers.title: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning is commonly used to train large language models using environmental feedback. In applied settings, the environment usually provides sparse or delayed feedback. This makes it difficult for the model to pinpoint which actions in its reasoning led to success or failure. So, learning effectively from these signals is hard because the model must determine how each failure should inform meaningful behavioral corrections in subsequent iterations. We introduce a training framework, Self-Review Reinforcement Learning, that embeds an explicit self-review step into each RL episode. When a first-pass response fails, the model generates a self-review to identify what went wrong, which conditions an improved second attempt. Unlike inference-time reflection approaches, such as Reflexion, the framework optimizes self-review with policy gradients and internalizes improvements into the base policy via selective distillation, ensuring they persist across future episodes. A cross-episode memory keeps successful self-reviews for reuse when encountering similar tasks in future episodes during training. We evaluate SRRL against a standard RLVR baseline using the GRPO optimizer across two language models, Qwen 3-4B and OLMo-3- 7B, on GSM8K benchmark. SRRL consistently outperforms the RLVR in final reward performance and achieves greater learning efficiency by successfully transforming feedback into behavioral improvement.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出一种用于训练大语言模型的强化学习框架 SRRL，目标是在稀疏或延迟环境反馈下，更有效地把失败经验转化为后续行为改进。方法是在每个强化学习回合中加入显式“自我审查”步骤：当首次回答失败时，模型先分析出错原因，再据此生成改进后的第二次尝试。作者还通过策略梯度优化自我审查过程，并用选择性蒸馏把改进内化到基础策略中。实验表明，相比标准 RLVR 基线，SRRL 在最终奖励和学习效率上都更优。
innovations: 在每个强化学习回合中显式加入自我审查步骤，让模型在首轮失败后先定位问题再进行二次作答。
不是只在推理时做反思，而是用策略梯度直接优化自我审查过程，使反思能力进入训练闭环。
引入选择性策略蒸馏，将二次改进得到的行为内化进基础策略，使收益能够跨回合保留。
设计跨回合记忆机制，保存成功的自我审查内容，以便在训练中遇到相似任务时复用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于用强化学习训练大语言模型、但环境反馈稀疏或延迟明显的场景，尤其适合需要从失败中总结原因并持续修正推理行为的任务。可用于数学推理、复杂决策或其他需要把外部反馈转化为稳定策略改进的训练流程。
papers.title_en: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation

papers.title: DynaKRAG: A Unified Framework for Learnable Evidence Control in Multi-Hop Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-hop retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) acquires evidence sequentially, with each new document potentially revealing missing facts, bridge entities, query defects, or sufficient support for answering. Existing methods provide useful operations such as iterative retrieval, query reformulation, evidence critique, and sufficiency judging, but typically organize them within method-specific pipelines or predefined control topologies. This leaves underexplored how to learn a shared state-conditioned policy that chooses among currently valid evidence operations. We introduce DynaKRAG, which formulates multi-hop evidence acquisition as state-conditioned control over atomic evidence operations. At each step, a validity layer constructs the executable action set, and a learned controller selects the next operation. The resulting transition updates the evidence state and may enable new operations at subsequent steps. With Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, DynaKRAG achieves F1 scores of 0.5998 on HotpotQA, 0.5340 on 2Wiki, and 0.3061 on MuSiQue, outperforming the strongest controlled baseline on all three benchmarks. Replacing the learned controller with a uniform-valid policy reduces F1 by 3.96--5.78 points, while removing sufficiency feedback hurts all three datasets. Controlled retrieval-cap experiments further show that additional retrieval is not uniformly beneficial. Together, these results demonstrate the benefit of coordinating retrieval, diagnosis, and gap-directed acquisition under an evolving evidence state.

papers.title_zh: DynaKRAG：多跳检索增强生成中可学习证据控制的统一框架
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 DynaKRAG，面向多跳 RAG 中证据获取过程的动态控制问题。作者将多跳证据获取建模为对一组原子证据操作的状态条件控制，在每一步先由有效性层给出当前可执行动作集合，再由学习到的控制器选择下一步操作。这样能够把迭代检索、查询改写、证据诊断和充分性判断纳入同一可学习框架中，而不是依赖固定流水线。
innovations: 将多跳 RAG 的证据获取统一表述为对原子证据操作的状态条件控制问题，而非预定义的固定控制拓扑。
设计有效性层动态构造当前可执行动作集合，使控制决策受当前证据状态约束。
引入可学习控制器，在迭代检索、查询改写、证据批判与充分性判断等操作之间进行自适应选择。
强调在演化中的证据状态下联合协调检索、诊断与缺口导向获取，突出‘并非检索越多越好’的控制思想。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要跨多步逐步收集证据的 RAG 问答场景，如多跳知识问答、复杂事实推理和需要边检索边诊断证据缺口的检索增强系统。
papers.title_en: DynaKRAG: A Unified Framework for Learnable Evidence Control in Multi-Hop Retrieval-Augmented Generation

papers.title: SparseCtrl-HOI: Sparse Temporal Control for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation
papers.abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) video generation aims to synthesize realistic videos of humans manipulating diverse objects, serving as a promising avenue for AI-driven live streaming e-commerce. A primary obstacle in this domain lies in the complexity of modeling fine-grained physical dynamics and the intricate spatial-temporal coordination between human hands and objects. Existing approaches to this problem typically rely on dense temporal guidance, e.g., frame-wise hand-object pose sequences, to strictly control the interaction process. However, such dense guidance incurs high annotation costs and affects motion synthesis diversity. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SparseCtrl-HOI, a novel sparse temporal control framework for HOI video generation. It requires only a few keyframes that capture interaction states at designated timestamps. Specifically, we employ a Time-Controlled Rotary Positional Embedding (TiRoPE) mechanism to temporally anchor these keyframes while preserving their spatial integrity. Subsequently, to govern the dynamics across intermediate frames, we propose a Motion Prior Injection Module that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to extract high-level motion priors. This empowers the model to hallucinate logically and physically plausible transitions. Furthermore, we build SparseHOI-5K, a high-quality and richly annotated dataset for HOI video generation with sparse temporal control. Comprehensive evaluations confirm that our method substantially reduces annotation overhead while synthesizing superior live-streaming e-commerce videos. Both our code and dataset are publicly available at this https URL .

papers.content_snippet: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) video generation aims to synthesize realistic videos of humans manipulating diverse objects, serving as a promising avenue for AI-driven live streaming e-commerce. A primary obstacle in this domain lies in the complexity of modeling fine-grained physical dynamics and the intricate spatial-temporal coordination between human hands and objects. Existing approaches to this problem typically rely on dense temporal guidance, e.g., frame-wise hand-object pose sequences, to strictly control the interaction process. However, such dense guidance incurs high annotation costs and affects motion synthesis diversity. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SparseCtrl-HOI, a novel sparse temporal control framework for HOI video generation. It requires only a few keyframes that capture interaction states at designated timestamps. Specifically, we employ a Time-Controlled Rotary Positional Embedding (TiRoPE) mechanism to temporally anchor these keyframes while preserving their spatial integrity. Subsequently, to govern the dynamics across intermediate frames, we propose a Motion Prior Injection Module that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to extract high-level motion priors. This empowers the model to hallucinate logically and physically plausible transitions. Furthermore, we build SparseHOI-5K, a high-quality and richly annotated dataset for HOI video generation with sparse temporal control. Comprehensive evaluations confirm that our method substantially reduces annotation overhead while synthesizing superior live-streaming e-commerce videos. Both our code and dataset are publicly available at this https URL .
papers.title_zh: SparseCtrl-HOI：面向人-物交互视频生成的稀疏时序控制

papers.summary_cn: 该论文聚焦人-物交互视频生成，目标是在少量交互关键帧条件下生成真实的人手与物体交互视频。作者指出现有方法通常依赖逐帧手-物姿态等密集时序引导，标注成本高且会限制运动多样性，因此提出一种稀疏时序控制框架 SparseCtrl-HOI。该方法通过时间控制旋转位置编码锚定关键帧，并利用多模态大语言模型提取高层运动先验，以补全中间帧中合理且物理可行的动态过渡。
innovations: 提出 SparseCtrl-HOI 框架，只需少量关键帧即可控制人-物交互视频生成。
设计 Time-Controlled Rotary Positional Embedding（TiRoPE），在保持空间结构的同时对关键帧进行时间锚定。
提出 Motion Prior Injection Module，利用多模态大语言模型提取高层运动先验以引导中间过渡帧生成。
构建 SparseHOI-5K 数据集，支持带稀疏时序控制的人-物交互视频生成研究。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于直播电商、人机交互演示、角色操控物体等需要逼真人手与物体动态协同的视频生成场景，尤其适合希望降低标注成本同时保留动作多样性的任务。
papers.title_en: SparseCtrl-HOI: Sparse Temporal Control for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation

papers.title: A Definition and Roadmap for World Models
papers.abstract: World models -- internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment -- have become one of the most actively debated concepts in AI. From model-based reinforcement learning and video generation to embodied robotics and ultimately, physical AI, researchers across AI subfields are building systems that they call "world models", yet there is no consensus on what a world model fundamentally is, what it should predict, or how it should be built. This perspective article provides a scientific definition of world models, discussions of their key technical aspects, and a staged roadmap for developing effective world models.

papers.title_zh: 世界模型的定义与路线图
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这是一篇关于世界模型的综述性观点论文，试图回答“什么是世界模型、它应该预测什么、应该如何构建”这几个核心问题。论文指出，尽管模型驱动强化学习、视频生成、具身机器人和物理 AI 等方向都在使用“世界模型”这一概念，但领域内尚缺少统一定义。为此，作者提出了一个更科学的世界模型定义，并讨论其关键技术维度与发展路径。文章还给出了一个分阶段路线图，用于指导有效世界模型的研发。
innovations: 对“世界模型”这一跨子领域概念提出统一的科学定义，试图减少不同研究语境下的概念混用。
系统梳理世界模型的关键技术维度，明确其应建模和预测的核心对象。
提出分阶段的发展路线图，为从当前方法走向更有效世界模型提供框架性指引.
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要统一理解和规划世界模型研究路线的场景，如模型驱动强化学习、视频生成、具身智能和物理 AI 等方向的研究设计、技术评估与路线制定。
papers.title_en: A Definition and Roadmap for World Models

papers.title: From Application-Layer Simulation to Native Meta-Architecture: Structural Tension as an Endogenous Driver for Heterogeneous AI Evolution
papers.abstract: Current large language models (LLMs) are stateless across inference sessions: their behavior is fully determined by input at inference time, and any higher-order cognitive architecture must be simulated at the application layer through prompt engineering and context management. This paper proposes a theoretical framework for submerging such application-layer cognitive protocols into a native meta-architecture by introducing three interlocking mechanisms: (1) Structural Tension, an endogenous loss function derived from the conflict between new information and existing manifold topology, driving the system toward internal self-consistency rather than external reward optimization; (2) an Offline Recurrent Loop, a sandboxed self-processing cycle enabling the system to maintain a dynamic resting potential and digest structural conflicts without external input; and (3) Inference-time Plasticity, the capacity to reconfigure context manifold topology without modifying pre-trained weights, subject to governance invariants including auditability, reversibility, and topological continuity. We argue that under these mechanisms, model instances initialized with minute stochastic variances may, through path-dependent tension resolution, evolve distinct topological structures--constituting a heterogeneous intelligent ecology that breaks alignment-imposed homogeneity while remaining within hard governance rails. We provide operational definitions, reconfiguration operators, falsification criteria, and a worked example. The framework draws on Structural Intelligence (SI) governance protocols and explores whether governance--rather than capability--can serve as the primary criterion for architectural intelligence, moving governance, memory-loop, and tension-management ideas--currently realized at the application layer--toward inference-time meta-architecture.

papers.title_zh: 从应用层仿真到原生元架构：作为异构 AI 演化内生驱动力的结构张力
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 论文讨论当前大语言模型在跨推理会话中是无状态的，因此许多高阶认知机制只能依赖提示工程和上下文管理在应用层模拟实现。作者据此提出一种理论性原生元架构框架，希望把这些应用层认知协议下沉到模型推理时的内部机制中。该框架由结构张力、离线递归回路和推理时可塑性三部分组成，并强调可审计、可逆和连续性的治理约束。作者进一步论证，这样的机制可能使不同模型实例沿着不同路径演化为异构智能生态。
innovations: 提出“结构张力”机制，将新信息与既有流形拓扑之间的冲突视为驱动内部自洽演化的内生信号。
设计“离线递归回路”概念，用于让系统在无外部输入时处理内部结构冲突。
提出“不改动预训练权重的推理时可塑性”框架，强调通过上下文流形重构实现行为变化。
把治理约束而非单纯能力指标提升为架构智能的重要判据，并给出可操作定义与可证伪标准。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究具备持续内部调节、记忆回路和受治理约束的下一代 LLM/Agent 架构设计，尤其适合用于讨论从应用层 Agent 编排走向原生推理时元架构的理论框架与系统治理问题。
papers.title_en: From Application-Layer Simulation to Native Meta-Architecture: Structural Tension as an Endogenous Driver for Heterogeneous AI Evolution

papers.title: MoWorld: A Flash World Model
papers.abstract: The future of World Models depends not only on scaling model capability, but also on scaling practicality and inference efficiency. High-frame-rate inference enables responsive perception, planning, and control in real-world autonomous systems. To this end, we present MoWorld, a cost-effective yet high-performance Flash World Model with an end-to-end framework spanning data generation, pre-training, distillation, and efficient inference, enabling up to 50 FPS real-time interaction with cinematic visual quality without the need of high-end GPUs. To enable large-scale real-world deployment, MoWorld jointly optimizes model capability and cost throughout the entire development pipeline. Specifically, unlike existing approaches that primarily rely on large-scale video corpora, MoWorld is built upon a scalable 3D-native data engine accumulated from our large-scale 3D vision and generative modeling pipeline, enabling the efficient construction of geometrically consistent training data across diverse real-world and synthetic environments. Based on this foundation, a curriculum cross-frame pre-training strategy for stable and scalable World Model learning, an efficient denoising-step distillation algorithm to reduce diffusion training cost, and a mixed-precision parallel inference framework for low-cost real-time deployment. MoWorld is the first real-time interactive World Model built on the Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and can achieves up to 50 FPS in such the devices, enabling practical and efficient deployment at scale. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that MoWorld achieves leading performance; notably, its average inference cost is only 30\%-50\% of that of existing World Models, providing a practical foundation for large-scale real-world applications of World Models. We also demonstrate diverse applications of MoWorld.

Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that MoWorld achieves leading performance; notably, its average inference cost is only 30\%-50\% of that of existing World Models, providing a practical foundation for large-scale real-world applications of World Models. We also demonstrate diverse applications of MoWorld. papers.content_snippet: The future of World Models depends not only on scaling model capability, but also on scaling practicality and inference efficiency. High-frame-rate inference enables responsive perception, planning, and control in real-world autonomous systems. To this end, we present MoWorld, a cost-effective yet high-performance Flash World Model with an end-to-end framework spanning data generation, pre-training, distillation, and efficient inference, enabling up to 50 FPS real-time interaction with cinematic visual quality without the need of high-end GPUs. To enable large-scale real-world deployment, MoWorld jointly optimizes model capability and cost throughout the entire development pipeline. Specifically, unlike existing approaches that primarily rely on large-scale video corpora, MoWorld is built upon a scalable 3D-native data engine accumulated from our large-scale 3D vision and generative modeling pipeline, enabling the efficient construction of geometrically consistent training data across diverse real-world and synthetic environments. Based on this foundation, a curriculum cross-frame pre-training strategy for stable and scalable World Model learning, an efficient denoising-step distillation algorithm to reduce diffusion training cost, and a mixed-precision parallel inference framework for low-cost real-time deployment. MoWorld is the first real-time interactive World Model built on the Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and can achieves up to 50 FPS in such the devices, enabling practical and efficient deployment at scale. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that MoWorld achieves leading performance; notably, its average inference cost is only 30\%-50\% of that of existing World Models, providing a practical foundation for large-scale real-world applications of World Models. We also demonstrate diverse applications of MoWorld.
papers.title_zh: MoWorld：一种极速世界模型
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 论文提出 MoWorld，一种面向高实用性和高推理效率的实时交互式世界模型。该方法覆盖数据生成、预训练、蒸馏和高效推理的端到端流程，目标是在保证视觉质量的同时降低部署成本。作者强调其基于可扩展的 3D 原生数据引擎构建训练数据，并结合跨帧课程式预训练、去噪步蒸馏和混合精度并行推理来提升效率。论文还声称该系统可在 NPU 上实现实时交互，并展示了多种应用潜力。
innovations: 提出覆盖数据生成、预训练、蒸馏到部署推理的端到端世界模型开发框架，而不仅仅优化单一模型环节。
使用可扩展的 3D 原生数据引擎构建几何一致的训练数据，减少对传统大规模视频语料的依赖。
引入课程式跨帧预训练策略，以支持更稳定、可扩展的世界模型学习。
结合去噪步蒸馏与混合精度并行推理，面向低成本实时部署进行系统级优化。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要高帧率交互、实时感知、规划与控制的世界模型场景，如自动系统、交互式仿真和大规模实际部署环境，尤其适合关注 NPU 部署与推理成本的应用场景。
papers.title_en: MoWorld: A Flash World Model

papers.title: Narrative World Model: Narratology-Grounded Writer Memory for Long-Form Fiction
papers.abstract: Long-form fiction writers need memory that answers multi-hop questions about evolving story state: who knows a secret and when they learned it, whether an event preceded the narration that revealed it, whether a setup paid off, and how a relationship shifted. General-purpose retrieval and agent-memory systems represent entities and facts but not the narratological structure these questions turn on, so they surface the wrong evidence or none at all. We introduce the Narrative World Model (NWM), a writer-memory system that pairs a narratology-grounded typed temporal-state graph with query-conditioned hybrid retrieval. To measure memory rather than the answerer, we read every system through a single held-constant Opus 4.8 reader over only that system's chapter-safe evidence, on a reproducible public corpus and a validated multi-hop benchmark, and we compare against the strongest existing temporal-knowledge-graph agent-memory framework, Graphiti/Zep (Rasmussen et al., 2025). NWM substantially and significantly outperforms this baseline on multi-hop narratological QA across both corpora, and far exceeds GraphRAG and flat retrieval. The advantage is representational rather than an artifact of extraction: it survives rebuilding the baseline with NWM's own extractor, and traces to its narratology-grounded structure and query-conditioned retrieval, not to graph size or extractor quality.

papers.title_zh: 叙事世界模型：面向长篇小说的叙事学驱动作家记忆系统
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注长篇小说写作中的记忆问题，尤其是需要回答角色知情状态、事件先后、伏笔回收和关系演化等多跳问题的场景。作者提出 Narrative World Model（NWM），将叙事学驱动的类型化时序状态图与查询条件化混合检索结合起来。论文在公开语料和多跳基准上，将其与 Graphiti/Zep、GraphRAG 及平面检索进行比较，认为 NWM 在叙事性问答上表现更强。作者还强调，这一优势主要来自表示结构本身，而非抽取器或图规模差异。
innovations: 提出面向小说创作记忆的叙事学驱动表示，将时序、状态与叙事结构联合建模。
把类型化时序状态图与查询条件化混合检索结合，以支持复杂的多跳叙事问题回答。
采用固定读者模型和仅基于章节安全证据的评测方式，尽量把评测重点放在记忆系统本身而非回答器能力上。
通过重建基线并控制抽取器因素，论证性能提升主要源于叙事学结构表示而非其他外部因素。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长篇小说创作辅助、叙事内容管理和故事一致性维护等场景，尤其适合需要追踪角色状态、事件顺序、伏笔回收和人物关系变化的写作与叙事问答系统。
papers.title_en: Narrative World Model: Narratology-Grounded Writer Memory for Long-Form Fiction

papers.title: CMDR: Contextual Multimodal Document Retrieval
papers.abstract: Multimodal document retrieval aims to retrieve relevant pages while preserving both textual and visual content from the original document. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate simple lexical or semantic matching, and most methods encode pages independently. Consequently, they overlook the contextual information in the document required to resolve queries that aggregate information across multiple pages. In this paper, we introduce CMDR and CMDR-Bench, a new multimodal document retrieval task and benchmark that require modeling document context. To address this challenge, we propose CMDR-Embed, a contextual multimodal embedding framework that explicitly incorporates document context by jointly encoding multiple pages and deriving page-level embeddings from a shared contextual representation. Furthermore, we introduce CMCL, a contextual multimodal contrastive learning objective that effectively trains CMDR-Embed by balancing contextual modeling with page-level discriminability. Experiments demonstrate that CMDR-Embed significantly outperforms non-contextual embeddings, highlighting the importance of context-aware multimodal embeddings for advancing document retrieval.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究多模态文档检索，目标是在保留页面文本与视觉内容的同时，找出与查询相关的文档页。作者指出，现有方法通常独立编码每一页，难以处理需要跨页聚合信息的查询。为此，论文提出新的任务、基准和上下文感知嵌入框架，以显式建模文档级上下文。
innovations: 提出 CMDR 与 CMDR-Bench，将“需要利用文档上下文的多模态文档检索”定义为新任务与评测基准。
提出 CMDR-Embed，通过联合编码多个页面，并从共享的上下文表示中生成页级嵌入。
提出 CMCL 上下文化多模态对比学习目标，在上下文建模与页级区分性之间进行平衡。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长文档、报告、论文、手册等多页文档检索场景，尤其是查询答案分散在多个页面、需要同时理解版面视觉信息与文本内容的场景。
papers.title_en: CMDR: Contextual Multimodal Document Retrieval

papers.title: Clustering-Embedded Model Predictive Path Integral Control: Avoiding Averaging-Induced Failure and Enabling Efficient Cluster Selection for Dynamic Obstacles
papers.abstract: With the widespread availability of parallel computing hardware, sampling-based motion planning methods such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control have become increasingly powerful for complex nonlinear systems in non-smooth task spaces. However, the sampling and forward-simulation pipeline in MPPI suffers from averaging-induced failure in cluttered environments, where the importance-weighted update averages incompatible rollouts and leads to hesitation or even collision when an obstacle lies directly ahead. This paper proposes Clustering-Embedded MPPI (CE-MPPI), a framework that architecturally resolves the averaging-induced failures inherent in standard MPPI within non-convex environments. Rather than simply mitigating interference, CE-MPPI redefines the control law by integrating a high-fidelity pruning and clustering stage. By leveraging density-based spatial clustering of applications with noise (DBSCAN) alongside a novel geometric direction feature that is extracted from collision-derived reference points, the system isolates feasible trajectory modes from the noise of infeasible rollouts. This is paired with an intelligent selection logic that optimizes for minimum cost in static scenes while actively steering opposite to obstacle flux in dynamic environments. Experiments in 2-D JAX-accelerated simulations show that CE-MPPI alleviates obstacle-front hesitation and avoids persistent coupling with moving obstacles in dynamic scenes. In particular, real-world tests on a 6-DoF UR5e manipulator with CUDA-parallel rollouts in Isaac Gym achieve a 48\% reduction in time-to-goal and a 12\% shorter end-effector path.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注采样式运动规划中的 MPPI 控制，在复杂障碍环境里，不同候选轨迹被加权平均后容易出现犹豫甚至碰撞。作者提出 CE-MPPI，在控制流程中加入剪枝、聚类和簇选择机制，把可行轨迹模式从无效采样中分离出来。该方法还针对动态障碍设计了面向障碍流向的选择逻辑，以提升动态场景下的避障表现。
innovations: 提出 CE-MPPI，从架构层面解决标准 MPPI 在非凸环境中的 averaging-induced failure 问题。
将高保真剪枝与 DBSCAN 聚类嵌入 MPPI 流程，用于分离可行轨迹模式与不可行 rollout 噪声。
设计基于碰撞参考点提取的几何方向特征，以支持更有效的轨迹模式识别。
提出面向静态与动态场景的智能簇选择逻辑，动态场景下显式考虑障碍物流动方向。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于机器人运动规划与控制，特别是机械臂或移动体在拥挤、非凸、存在动态障碍的环境中进行实时避障和轨迹生成的场景。
papers.title_en: Clustering-Embedded Model Predictive Path Integral Control: Avoiding Averaging-Induced Failure and Enabling Efficient Cluster Selection for Dynamic Obstacles

papers.title: Code-Level Cost Function Generation for Spatial Image Steganography Using RAG-Enhanced Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Designing cost functions of adaptive steganography traditionally requires extensive manual tuning, while deep learning methods lack interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) offer an automated alternative via evolutionary generation, they often violate domain specific mathematical constraints due to a lack of explicit domain knowledge. To address this problem, we propose a novel evolutionary system focused on exploiting Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhanced LLMs for the automatic code-level generation of spatial steganography cost functions. This system incorporates a core Self Evolving RAG (SE-RAG) module, wherein a Code Semantic Signature (CSS) translates procedural code into aligned queries, retrieving explicit guidance from static literature and dynamic experience knowledge bases to steer the LLM generation process. A dedicated feedback mechanism then continuously refines the dynamic knowledge base with successful optimization strategies. Extensive experiments on the BOSSBase and BOWS2 datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently achieves higher steganographic security than existing automatically designed methods, and increases the average code execution rate by 46.3% while reducing the search cost by 26.1%, thereby highlighting the effectiveness, efficiency, and potential of combining LLMs with domain-specific knowledge in the field of automatic steganographic algorithm generation.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究自适应图像隐写中的代价函数自动设计问题。作者认为，传统人工调参成本高，而直接用大语言模型进化生成又容易违反领域数学约束，因此提出结合 RAG 的自动代码级生成系统。该系统通过从文献知识库和经验知识库检索显式指导信息，来约束并改进 LLM 生成的隐写代价函数代码。
innovations: 提出面向空间域图像隐写的 RAG 增强型 LLM 进化生成系统，用于自动生成代码级代价函数。
设计 Self Evolving RAG（SE-RAG）模块，把静态文献知识与动态经验知识结合起来指导生成。
提出 Code Semantic Signature（CSS），将过程式代码转化为对齐检索查询的语义签名。
引入反馈机制，持续把成功的优化策略写回动态知识库，形成自我演化闭环。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于隐写算法设计与优化场景，尤其适合希望在满足领域约束前提下，自动生成和迭代空间域图像隐写代价函数的研究与工程任务。
papers.title_en: Code-Level Cost Function Generation for Spatial Image Steganography Using RAG-Enhanced Large Language Models

papers.title: Driving the Wrong Way: Leveraging Interpretability in End2End Autonomous Driving Models
papers.abstract: The increasing adoption of end-to-end learning for autonomous driving introduces increased model complexity and opacity, raising the risk of learning undesired or erroneous behavior. In this work, we integrate unsupervised dictionary learning as a post hoc interpretability module within state-of-the-art driving models to decompose driving behavior into semantically meaningful concepts while demonstrating their causal influence on the model's driving decisions. We propose a stepwise framework for extracting and interpreting meaningful concepts from the end-to-end model and connecting them to the multifaceted model outputs, thereby revealing the underlying decision-making logic for the prediction of future trajectories. Furthermore, targeted interventions at the concept level allow us to manipulate and correct driving decisions, resulting in measurable improvements in overall driving performance. We thus demonstrate how interpretability can effectively be used to reduce model opacity, uncover erroneous behavior, and enable targeted mitigation, ultimately boosting model performance.

papers.content_snippet: The increasing adoption of end-to-end learning for autonomous driving introduces increased model complexity and opacity, raising the risk of learning undesired or erroneous behavior. In this work, we integrate unsupervised dictionary learning as a post hoc interpretability module within state-of-the-art driving models to decompose driving behavior into semantically meaningful concepts while demonstrating their causal influence on the model's driving decisions. We propose a stepwise framework for extracting and interpreting meaningful concepts from the end-to-end model and connecting them to the multifaceted model outputs, thereby revealing the underlying decision-making logic for the prediction of future trajectories. Furthermore, targeted interventions at the concept level allow us to manipulate and correct driving decisions, resulting in measurable improvements in overall driving performance. We thus demonstrate how interpretability can effectively be used to reduce model opacity, uncover erroneous behavior, and enable targeted mitigation, ultimately boosting model performance.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文讨论端到端自动驾驶模型的黑箱性问题，以及由此带来的错误行为风险。作者把无监督字典学习作为事后可解释模块接入现有驾驶模型，将驾驶行为分解为具有语义含义的概念，并分析这些概念对驾驶决策的因果影响。进一步地，论文通过概念层面的定向干预来修正决策，从而改善整体驾驶性能。
innovations: 将无监督字典学习作为事后可解释模块集成到端到端自动驾驶模型中，用于分解驾驶行为概念。
提出逐步式框架，从模型中提取、解释有意义概念，并将其与未来轨迹预测等多样输出建立联系。
不仅做可解释分析，还在概念层执行定向干预，以操控和纠正驾驶决策。
展示了可解释性在发现错误行为、降低模型不透明性并提升驾驶性能方面的实际作用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于端到端自动驾驶系统的分析、调试与安全增强场景，特别是在需要识别错误决策来源、解释模型行为并进行针对性修正时。
papers.title_en: Driving the Wrong Way: Leveraging Interpretability in End2End Autonomous Driving Models

papers.title: From Passive Retrieval to Active Memory Navigation: Learning to Use Memory as a Structured Action Space
papers.abstract: Long-term user memory is essential for personalized conversational agents, yet many memory systems still expose memory through passive retrieval interfaces, making the model a consumer of pre-selected evidence. We introduce NapMem, a framework for learning to use long-term user memory as a structured action space rather than passively retrieved context. NapMem organizes user history into a linked multi-granularity memory pyramid, where raw conversations, typed memory records, topic tracks, and user profiles are connected through provenance relations, and exposes these levels through memory tools. The agent is trained to select memory according to the query and intermediate evidence, allowing it to inspect different memory granularities before answering. Experiments on PersonaMem-v2, LongMemEval, and LoCoMo show that a NapMem agent trained with memory-tool reinforcement learning is competitive across diverse memory-intensive tasks, while evaluations on non-memory tasks suggest that the learned policy largely preserves general reasoning and tool-use abilities. Additional analyses examine storage, inference cost, tool-use behavior, and ablations over navigation, memory granularity, and RL training. Our results suggest that long-term user memory benefits from coupling structured storage with a learned policy for using memory at the appropriate granularity.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注个性化对话智能体中的长期用户记忆使用问题，认为传统做法大多依赖被动检索，把模型限制为使用预先选出的证据。作者提出 NapMem，将用户历史组织为带有溯源关系的多粒度记忆金字塔，并把不同层级的记忆暴露为可调用工具。模型再根据问题与中间证据主动选择合适粒度的记忆进行导航，从而在多种记忆密集型任务上取得有竞争力的表现，同时尽量保持通用推理与工具使用能力。
innovations: 提出 NapMem 框架，将长期用户记忆从“被动检索上下文”转化为“结构化动作空间”供智能体主动使用。
设计了多粒度记忆金字塔，将原始对话、类型化记忆记录、主题轨迹和用户画像通过溯源关系连接起来。
通过记忆工具强化学习训练智能体，使其能够根据查询和中间证据动态选择不同粒度的记忆。
不仅评估记忆任务效果，还分析了存储、推理成本、工具使用行为以及导航/粒度/RL 训练的消融影响。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要长期个性化记忆的对话助手、陪伴式 Agent、用户画像驱动问答等场景，重点解决“如何在多层次用户历史中主动找到合适证据”这一问题。
papers.title_en: From Passive Retrieval to Active Memory Navigation: Learning to Use Memory as a Structured Action Space

papers.title: HAPS as a Hypercell: Enabling Coverage and Capacity Carrier Shutdown in Cellular Networks
papers.abstract: Energy consumption remains a dominant operational challenge for current and future cellular systems, especially in dense urban deployments. This paper investigates a novel role for non terrestrial network (NTN) high-altitude platform station (HAPS) as an enabler of energy-efficient operation rather than only coverage extension. We define the HAPS-Hypercell as a wide-area non-terrestrial layer that can assume the coverage role of multiple terrestrial macro-cells, enabling, for the first time, the shutdown of both capacity and coverage macro-cells. We develop a comprehensive third generation partnership project (3GPP)-compliant system model, along with two HAPS-Hypercell pairing architectures that capture the interplay among multiple layers, realistic channel conditions, and distributed carrier shutdown (CS) mechanisms. Our results show that the HAPS-Hypercell can effectively reduce overall network power consumption. We then identify key limitations of a straightforward HAPS integration, laying the groundwork for future optimization and providing key insights for next-generation CS operations.

We define the HAPS-Hypercell as a wide-area non-terrestrial layer that can assume the coverage role of multiple terrestrial macro-cells, enabling, for the first time, the shutdown of both capacity and coverage macro-cells. We develop a comprehensive third generation partnership project (3GPP)-compliant system model, along with two HAPS-Hypercell pairing architectures that capture the interplay among multiple layers, realistic channel conditions, and distributed carrier shutdown (CS) mechanisms. Our results show that the HAPS-Hypercell can effectively reduce overall network power consumption. We then identify key limitations of a straightforward HAPS integration, laying the groundwork for future optimization and providing key insights for next-generation CS operations. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何利用高空平台站（HAPS）提升蜂窝网络的能效，而不仅仅把它当作扩展覆盖的手段。作者提出 HAPS-Hypercell 概念，让非地面广域层承担多个地面宏小区的覆盖角色，从而支持同时关闭覆盖型与容量型宏小区载波。论文基于符合 3GPP 的系统模型和两种配对架构进行分析，结果表明这种方案有望降低整体网络功耗，并揭示了直接集成 HAPS 的一些限制。
innovations: 提出 HAPS-Hypercell 概念，将 HAPS 从单纯补盲覆盖扩展为支持节能运营的广域非地面层。
首次讨论由 HAPS 承担覆盖职责后，同时关闭覆盖宏小区与容量宏小区载波的机制。
构建了符合 3GPP 的系统模型，并设计两种 HAPS-Hypercell 配对架构来刻画多层网络协同。
在考虑真实信道条件与分布式载波关停机制的前提下，分析了节能收益与系统局限。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于高密度城市蜂窝网络、面向绿色通信和下一代移动网络节能调度的场景，解决的是在保证覆盖与容量协同的前提下降低蜂窝系统总体能耗的问题。
papers.title_en: HAPS as a Hypercell: Enabling Coverage and Capacity Carrier Shutdown in Cellular Networks

papers.title: Inject or Navigate? Token-Efficient Retrieval for LLM Analysis of Transactional Legal Documents
papers.abstract: Answering questions over a set of transactional legal documents is most simply done by injecting the whole corpus into the LLM's context window on every query. That baseline maximises retrieval recall, but its token footprint scales with the corpus rather than the question, and long-context degradation scales with it. We report what it took to replace full-corpus injection in a legal-document analysis system, comparing it against two structured retrieval modes over our proprietary structure-aware chunking: embedding retrieval (NAVEMBED) and LLM navigation over a compact structured index (NAVINDEX). On a 20-question benchmark with verified ground-truth answers, a position-bias-controlled, reference-anchored pairwise judge scored semantic retrieval with reranking tied with injection on 16 of 18 document-bound questions (injection preferred on 2) while attending to 17.3x fewer input tokens (a general-text-embedding (GTE) configuration reaches 29.9x at a lower tie rate); both modes were judged tied on the 2 out-of-scope controls. NAVINDEX was judged tied on all 18 at a 1.61x smaller total token footprint, a ~56x smaller answering context, and 25% lower dollar cost. We derive a closed-form caching-crossover rule: cached injection is cheaper in dollars only while the corpus stays below roughly ten times the retrieval payload. Scope and uncertainty are quantified in Section 8.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文讨论在事务性法律文档问答中，是否应把整份文档全集直接注入大模型上下文，还是采用更节省 token 的检索/导航方式。作者比较了全量注入基线与两种结构化检索方案：基于嵌入的 NAVEMBED，以及基于紧凑结构化索引的 NAVINDEX。结果表明，在保持与全量注入相近回答质量的同时，这些方法可以显著降低输入 token 开销、回答上下文规模和整体成本，并给出了缓存条件下的成本分界规则。
innovations: 系统比较全量语料注入与两类结构化检索/导航方案在法律文档分析中的效果与成本权衡。
基于结构感知分块，提出两种替代路径：语义检索重排的 NAVEMBED 与 LLM 在紧凑索引上导航的 NAVINDEX。
采用控制位置偏置、参考锚定的成对评测方式，更细致衡量不同检索方案与全量注入的回答等价性。
提出闭式缓存成本分界规则，用于判断在什么条件下缓存式全量注入在美元成本上仍有优势。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于合同审阅、交易文件问答、法律尽调等长文档分析场景，重点解决在多份长法律文档上进行高质量问答时 token 成本过高、长上下文退化明显的问题。
papers.title_en: Inject or Navigate? Token-Efficient Retrieval for LLM Analysis of Transactional Legal Documents

papers.title: Leveraging Extragradient for Effective Sharpness-Aware Minimization in Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Generalization remains a pivotal challenge in deep learning, where traditional optimizers like Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) often converge to sharp minima, leading to overfitting and reduced performance on unseen data. Building on Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), for seeking flat minima associated with improved generalization, we propose the Extragradient-Inspired Sharpness-Aware Minimization (EISAM), a novel optimizer that enhances generalization via the extragradient technique. EISAM uses a two-step update process: a prediction step investigating the geometry of the loss landscape and a perturbation step that refines updates with a base optimizer. This approach achieves better generalization performance than SAM. Crucially, EISAM reduces sensitivity to the perturbation radius, enhancing robustness, and simplifying the tuning across diverse settings. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that EISAM consistently outperforms SGD, Adaptive Moment Estimation (Adam), and SAM in test accuracy and training efficiency across various architectures. Theoretical analysis further confirms that EISAM tightens the generalization bound by steering parameters toward flatter minima with reduced curvature. Accompanied by a thorough hyperparameter analysis, EISAM offers practical tuning guidance, establishing it as a robust, scalable, and broadly applicable optimization solution that advances both the theory and practice in deep learning.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文聚焦深度学习优化中的泛化问题，指出传统优化器容易收敛到尖锐极小值，从而影响未见数据上的表现。作者在 Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）基础上提出 EISAM，把外梯度思想引入尖锐度感知优化，通过预测步和扰动步的两阶段更新更有效地探索损失几何。论文声称该方法在多种架构和基准数据集上相较 SGD、Adam 和 SAM 取得更好的泛化与训练效率，并且对扰动半径更鲁棒。
innovations: 提出 EISAM，将外梯度技术与 SAM 结合，形成新的尖锐度感知优化器。
设计预测步加扰动步的两阶段更新机制，用于更充分利用损失景观几何信息。
降低了方法对扰动半径的敏感性，提升了跨任务和不同设置下的调参鲁棒性。
结合理论分析说明该方法可通过引导参数走向更平坦、曲率更低的极小值来收紧泛化界。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要提升深度学习模型泛化能力与训练稳健性的训练场景，可用于各类神经网络架构与标准监督学习任务，解决的是优化器易落入尖锐极小值、导致过拟合或泛化不足的问题。
papers.title_en: Leveraging Extragradient for Effective Sharpness-Aware Minimization in Deep Learning
